import uuid
from datetime import datetime, timezone
from sqlalchemy import Text, DateTime
from sqlalchemy.orm import Mapped, mapped_column
from sqlalchemy.dialects.postgresql import UUID, JSONB
from app.models import Base


class User(Base):
    __tablename__ = "users"

    id: Mapped[uuid.UUID] = mapped_column(UUID(as_uuid=True), primary_key=True, default=uuid.uuid4)
    email: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(Text, unique=True, nullable=False)
    hashed_password: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(Text)
    google_id: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(Text, unique=True)
    auth_provider: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(Text, default="local")
    gmail_oauth_token: Mapped[dict | None] = mapped_column(JSONB)
    google_profile: Mapped[dict] = mapped_column(JSONB, default=dict)
    last_login_at: Mapped[datetime | None] = mapped_column(DateTime(timezone=True))
    created_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(
        DateTime(timezone=True), default=lambda: datetime.now(timezone.utc)
    )
    updated_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(
        DateTime(timezone=True),
        default=lambda: datetime.now(timezone.utc),
        onupdate=lambda: datetime.now(timezone.utc),
    )

from datetime import datetime, timezone
from sqlalchemy import Text, DateTime, ForeignKey
from sqlalchemy.orm import Mapped, mapped_column
from sqlalchemy.dialects.postgresql import UUID, JSONB
from app.models import Base

    __tablename__ = "campaigns"

    id: Mapped[uuid.UUID] = mapped_column(UUID(as_uuid=True), primary_key=True, default=uuid.uuid4)
    user_id: Mapped[uuid.UUID] = mapped_column(
        UUID(as_uuid=True), ForeignKey("users.id"), nullable=False
    )

        DateTime(timezone=True), default=lambda: datetime.now(timezone.utc)
    )
    updated_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(
        DateTime(timezone=True),
        default=lambda: datetime.now(timezone.utc),
        onupdate=lambda: datetime.now(timezone.utc),

from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends, BackgroundTasks
from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession
from uuid import UUID

from app.deps import get_db, get_current_user
from app.schemas.campaign import CreateCampaignRequest
from app.schemas.chat import FinalizeSessionRequest
from app.services.campaign_service import CampaignService
from app.services.chat_service import ChatService
from app.repositories.campaign_repository import CampaignRepository
from app.services.llm_service import LLMService
from app.providers.llm.openai_provider import OpenAIProvider
from app.models.user import User

router = APIRouter(prefix="/campaigns", tags=["campaigns"])


def get_llm_service() -> LLMService:
    return LLMService(provider=OpenAIProvider())


def get_campaign_service(
    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
    llm: LLMService = Depends(get_llm_service),
) -> CampaignService:
    return CampaignService(CampaignRepository(db), llm)


@router.post("", status_code=201)
async def create_campaign(
    req: CreateCampaignRequest,
    service: CampaignService = Depends(get_campaign_service),
    user: User = Depends(get_current_user),
    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
):
    campaign, session = await service.create_campaign(user.id, req.type)
    await db.commit()
    first_message = service.llm_service.get_first_message(req.type)
    return {
        "campaign_id": campaign.id,
        "session_id": session.id,
        "status": campaign.status,
        "first_message": first_message,
    }


@router.get("")
async def list_campaigns(
    service: CampaignService = Depends(get_campaign_service),
    user: User = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    campaigns = await service.list_campaigns(user.id)
    return {
        "campaigns": [
            {
                "id": c.id,
                "type": c.type,
                "status": c.status,
                "created_at": c.created_at,
            }
            for c in campaigns
        ],
        "total": len(campaigns),
    }


@router.get("/{campaign_id}")
async def get_campaign(
    campaign_id: UUID,
    service: CampaignService = Depends(get_campaign_service),
    user: User = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    campaign = await service.get_campaign(campaign_id, user.id)
    return {
        "id": campaign.id,
        "type": campaign.type,
        "status": campaign.status,
        "config_json": campaign.config_json,
        "created_at": campaign.created_at,
    }


@router.get("/{campaign_id}/stats")
async def get_campaign_stats(
    campaign_id: UUID,
    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
    user: User = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    repo = CampaignRepository(db)
    stats = await repo.get_stats(campaign_id, user.id)
    return stats


@router.put("/{campaign_id}/sessions", status_code=202)
async def finalize_session(
    campaign_id: UUID,
    req: FinalizeSessionRequest,
    background_tasks: BackgroundTasks,
    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
    user: User = Depends(get_current_user),
    llm: LLMService = Depends(get_llm_service),
):
    chat_service = ChatService(CampaignRepository(db), llm)
    await chat_service.finalize_session(campaign_id, req.extracted_params)

    from app.models.campaign import Campaign
    from sqlalchemy import update

    await db.execute(
        update(Campaign).where(Campaign.id == campaign_id).values(status="processing")
    )
    await db.commit()

    from app.tasks.processor_task import run_processor
    from app.deps import AsyncSessionLocal

    background_tasks.add_task(run_processor, campaign_id, user.id, AsyncSessionLocal)

    return {
        "message": "Research started. You'll see contacts appear in your dashboard shortly.",
        "campaign_id": campaign_id,
    }

from uuid import UUID
from app.models.campaign import Campaign
from app.models.campaign_session import CampaignSession
from app.repositories.campaign_repository import CampaignRepository
from app.services.llm_service import LLMService
from app.core.exceptions import NotFoundError


class CampaignService:
    def __init__(self, campaign_repo: CampaignRepository, llm_service: LLMService):
        self.campaign_repo = campaign_repo
        self.llm_service = llm_service

    async def create_campaign(
        self, user_id: UUID, campaign_type: str
    ) -> tuple[Campaign, CampaignSession]:
        campaign = Campaign(user_id=user_id, type=campaign_type, status="draft")
        campaign = await self.campaign_repo.create(campaign)
        session = CampaignSession(campaign_id=campaign.id, status="active")
        session = await self.campaign_repo.create_session(session)
        first_message = self.llm_service.get_first_message(campaign_type)
        # Add assistant first message to chat history
        session.chat_history = [{"role": "assistant", "content": first_message}]
        session = await self.campaign_repo.update(session)
        return campaign, session

    async def get_campaign(self, campaign_id: UUID, user_id: UUID) -> Campaign:
        campaign = await self.campaign_repo.get_by_id_for_user(campaign_id, user_id)
        if not campaign:
            raise NotFoundError(f"Campaign {campaign_id} not found")
        return campaign

    async def list_campaigns(self, user_id: UUID) -> list[Campaign]:
        return await self.campaign_repo.list_for_user(user_id)

from typing import AsyncGenerator
from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import create_async_engine, AsyncSession, async_sessionmaker
from app.config import settings
from app.core.security import decode_token
from app.repositories.user_repository import UserRepository
from fastapi import Depends, HTTPException
from fastapi.security import HTTPBearer, HTTPAuthorizationCredentials

engine = create_async_engine(settings.DATABASE_URL, echo=False)
AsyncSessionLocal = async_sessionmaker(engine, expire_on_commit=False)


async def get_db() -> AsyncGenerator[AsyncSession, None]:
    async with AsyncSessionLocal() as session:
        yield session


security = HTTPBearer()


async def get_current_user(
    credentials: HTTPAuthorizationCredentials = Depends(security),
    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
):
    try:
        payload = decode_token(credentials.credentials)
        if payload.get("token_type") != "access":
            raise ValueError("Not an access token")
        user_repo = UserRepository(db)
        user = await user_repo.get_by_id(payload["sub"])
        if not user:
            raise ValueError("User not found")
        return user
    except Exception:
        raise HTTPException(
            status_code=401,
            detail={
                "error": {"code": "UNAUTHORIZED", "message": "Invalid or expired token"}
            },
        )

from uuid import UUID
from sqlalchemy import select, update, func
from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession
from app.repositories.base import AsyncBaseRepository
from app.models.campaign import Campaign
from app.models.campaign_session import CampaignSession
from app.models.email_job import EmailJob


class CampaignRepository(AsyncBaseRepository[Campaign]):
    def __init__(self, session: AsyncSession):
        super().__init__(session, Campaign)

    async def get_by_id_for_user(self, campaign_id: UUID, user_id: UUID) -> Campaign | None:
        result = await self.session.execute(
            select(Campaign).where(
                Campaign.id == campaign_id, Campaign.user_id == user_id
            )
        )
        return result.scalar_one_or_none()

    async def list_for_user(self, user_id: UUID) -> list[Campaign]:
        result = await self.session.execute(
            select(Campaign)
            .where(Campaign.user_id == user_id)
            .order_by(Campaign.created_at.desc())
        )
        return list(result.scalars().all())

    async def create_session(self, session: CampaignSession) -> CampaignSession:
        self.session.add(session)
        await self.session.flush()
        await self.session.refresh(session)
        return session

    async def get_session(self, campaign_id: UUID) -> CampaignSession | None:
        result = await self.session.execute(
            select(CampaignSession).where(CampaignSession.campaign_id == campaign_id)
        )
        return result.scalar_one_or_none()

    async def update_status(self, campaign_id: UUID, status: str) -> None:
        await self.session.execute(
            update(Campaign).where(Campaign.id == campaign_id).values(status=status)
        )
        await self.session.flush()

    async def get_stats(self, campaign_id: UUID, user_id: UUID) -> dict:
        campaign = await self.get_by_id_for_user(campaign_id, user_id)
        if not campaign:
            from app.core.exceptions import NotFoundError

            raise NotFoundError(f"Campaign {campaign_id} not found")

        from app.models.contact import Contact

        total_contacts = await self.session.scalar(
            select(func.count())
            .select_from(Contact)
            .where(Contact.campaign_id == campaign_id)
        )

        total_drafts = await self.session.scalar(
            select(func.count())
            .select_from(EmailJob)
            .where(EmailJob.campaign_id == campaign_id)
        )

        async def count_status(status: str) -> int:
            return await self.session.scalar(
                select(func.count())
                .select_from(EmailJob)
                .where(
                    EmailJob.campaign_id == campaign_id, EmailJob.status == status
                )
            ) or 0

        async def count_draft_status(ds: str) -> int:
            return await self.session.scalar(
                select(func.count())
                .select_from(EmailJob)
                .where(
                    EmailJob.campaign_id == campaign_id, EmailJob.draft_status == ds
                )
            ) or 0

        return {
            "total_contacts": total_contacts or 0,
            "total_drafts": total_drafts or 0,
            "approved": await count_draft_status("approved"),
            "queued": await count_status("queued"),
            "sent": await count_status("sent"),
            "opened": await count_status("opened"),
            "replied": await count_status("replied"),
            "bounced": await count_status("bounced"),
            "failed": await count_status("failed"),
        }

import uuid
from datetime import datetime, timezone
from sqlalchemy import Text, DateTime, ForeignKey
from sqlalchemy.orm import Mapped, mapped_column
from sqlalchemy.dialects.postgresql import UUID, JSONB
from app.models import Base


class CampaignSession(Base):
    __tablename__ = "campaign_sessions"

    id: Mapped[uuid.UUID] = mapped_column(UUID(as_uuid=True), primary_key=True, default=uuid.uuid4)
    campaign_id: Mapped[uuid.UUID] = mapped_column(
        UUID(as_uuid=True), ForeignKey("campaigns.id"), nullable=False
    )
    chat_history: Mapped[list] = mapped_column(JSONB, default=list)
    extracted_params: Mapped[dict] = mapped_column(JSONB, default=dict)
    status: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(Text, default="active", nullable=False)
    created_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(
        DateTime(timezone=True), default=lambda: datetime.now(timezone.utc)
    )
    updated_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(
        DateTime(timezone=True),
        default=lambda: datetime.now(timezone.utc),
        onupdate=lambda: datetime.now(timezone.utc),
    )

from pydantic_settings import BaseSettings, SettingsConfigDict


class Settings(BaseSettings):
    model_config = SettingsConfigDict(env_file=".env", extra="ignore")

    APP_ENV: str = "development"
    SECRET_KEY: str = "dev-secret-change-in-prod"
    JWT_ALGORITHM: str = "HS256"
    ACCESS_TOKEN_EXPIRE_MINUTES: int = 60
    REFRESH_TOKEN_EXPIRE_DAYS: int = 30

    DATABASE_URL: str = "postgresql+asyncpg://outreach:outreach@localhost:5432/outreach_db"

    OPENAI_API_KEY: str = ""
    ANTHROPIC_API_KEY: str = ""
    DEFAULT_LLM_PROVIDER: str = "openai"
    DEFAULT_LLM_MODEL: str = "gpt-4o"

    APOLLO_API_KEY: str = ""

    GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID: str = ""
    GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET: str = ""
    GOOGLE_REDIRECT_URI: str = "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/auth/google/callback"

    GMAIL_DAILY_SEND_LIMIT: int = 450
    EMAIL_SEND_RATE_PER_SECOND: int = 1
    PROCESSOR_MAX_CONCURRENCY: int = 20


settings = Settings()


def get_settings() -> Settings:
    return settings

7	class OpenAIProvider(AbstractLLMProvider):
8	    def __init__(self):
9	        self.client = AsyncOpenAI(api_key=settings.OPENAI_API_KEY)
10	
11	    async def chat_completion(
12	        self, messages: list[dict], system_prompt: str, model: str
13	    ) -> str:
14	        msgs = [{"role": "system", "content": system_prompt}] + messages
15	        response = await self.client.chat.completions.create(model=model, messages=msgs)
16	        return response.choices[0].message.content
17	
18	    async def structured_completion(
19	        self, messages: list[dict], system_prompt: str, model: str
20	    ) -> dict:
21	        msgs = [
22	            {"role": "system", "content": system_prompt + "\n\nRespond with valid JSON only."}
23	        ] + messages
24	        response = await self.client.chat.completions.create(
25	            model=model, messages=msgs, response_format={"type": "json_object"}
26	        )
27	        return json.loads(response.choices[0].message.content)

import uuid
from datetime import datetime, timezone
from sqlalchemy import Text, DateTime, ForeignKey, Boolean
from sqlalchemy.orm import Mapped, mapped_column
from sqlalchemy.dialects.postgresql import UUID
from app.models import Base


class Contact(Base):
    __tablename__ = "contacts"

    id: Mapped[uuid.UUID] = mapped_column(UUID(as_uuid=True), primary_key=True, default=uuid.uuid4)
    campaign_id: Mapped[uuid.UUID] = mapped_column(
        UUID(as_uuid=True), ForeignKey("campaigns.id"), nullable=False
    )
    company: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(Text, nullable=False)
    person_name: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(Text)
    email: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(Text, nullable=False)
    title: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(Text)
    source: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(Text, default="apollo")
    bounce_risk: Mapped[bool] = mapped_column(Boolean, default=False)
    created_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(
        DateTime(timezone=True), default=lambda: datetime.now(timezone.utc)
    )

import uuid
from datetime import datetime, timezone
from sqlalchemy import Text, DateTime, ForeignKey
from sqlalchemy.orm import Mapped, mapped_column
from sqlalchemy.dialects.postgresql import UUID
from app.models import Base


class EmailJob(Base):
    __tablename__ = "email_jobs"

    id: Mapped[uuid.UUID] = mapped_column(UUID(as_uuid=True), primary_key=True, default=uuid.uuid4)
    campaign_id: Mapped[uuid.UUID] = mapped_column(
        UUID(as_uuid=True), ForeignKey("campaigns.id"), nullable=False
    )
    contact_id: Mapped[uuid.UUID] = mapped_column(
        UUID(as_uuid=True), ForeignKey("contacts.id"), nullable=False
    )
    subject: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(Text)
    body: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(Text)
    draft_status: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(Text, default="pending")
    status: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(Text, default="draft")
    gmail_message_id: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(Text)
    sent_at: Mapped[datetime | None] = mapped_column(DateTime(timezone=True))
    last_error: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(Text)
    created_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(
        DateTime(timezone=True), default=lambda: datetime.now(timezone.utc)
    )
    updated_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(
        DateTime(timezone=True),
        default=lambda: datetime.now(timezone.utc),
        onupdate=lambda: datetime.now(timezone.utc),
    )

attachment.content:
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- simplify: Review changed code for reuse, quality, and efficiency, then fix any issues found.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled remote agents (routines) on a cron schedule or once at a specific time. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring remote agent, set up automated tasks, create a cron job for Claude Code, or manage their scheduled agents/routines. Also use when the user wants a one-time scheduled run ("run this once at 3pm", "remind me to check X tomorrow").
- claude-api: Build, debug, and optimize Claude API / Anthropic SDK apps. Apps built with this skill should include prompt caching. Also handles migrating existing Claude API code between Claude model versions (4.5 → 4.6, 4.6 → 4.7, retired-model replacements).
TRIGGER when: code imports `anthropic`/`@anthropic-ai/sdk`; user asks for the Claude API, Anthropic SDK, or Managed Agents; user adds/modifies/tunes a Claude feature (caching, thinking, compaction, tool use, batch, files, citations, memory) or model (Opus/Sonnet/Haiku) in a file; questions about prompt caching / cache hit rate in an Anthropic SDK project.
SKIP: file imports `openai`/other-provider SDK, filename like `*-openai.py`/`*-generic.py`, provider-neutral code, general programming/ML.

import uuid
from datetime import datetime, timezone
from sqlalchemy import Text, DateTime
from sqlalchemy.orm import Mapped, mapped_column
from sqlalchemy.dialects.postgresql import UUID, JSONB
from app.models import Base


class User(Base):
    __tablename__ = "users"

    id: Mapped[uuid.UUID] = mapped_column(UUID(as_uuid=True), primary_key=True, default=uuid.uuid4)
    email: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(Text, unique=True, nullable=False)
    hashed_password: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(Text)
    google_id: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(Text, unique=True)
    auth_provider: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(Text, default="local")
    gmail_oauth_token: Mapped[dict | None] = mapped_column(JSONB)
    google_profile: Mapped[dict] = mapped_column(JSONB, default=dict)
    last_login_at: Mapped[datetime | None] = mapped_column(DateTime(timezone=True))

from datetime import datetime, timezone
from sqlalchemy import Text, DateTime, ForeignKey
from sqlalchemy.orm import Mapped, mapped_column
from sqlalchemy.dialects.postgresql import UUID, JSONB
from app.models import Base


class Campaign(Base):
    __tablename__ = "campaigns"

    id: Mapped[uuid.UUID] = mapped_column(UUID(as_uuid=True), primary_key=True, default=uuid.uuid4)
    user_id: Mapped[uuid.UUID] = mapped_column(
        UUID(as_uuid=True), ForeignKey("users.id"), nullable=False
    )
    type: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(Text, nullable=False)
    status: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(Text, default="draft", nullable=False)
    config_json: Mapped[dict] = mapped_column(JSONB, default=dict)
    created_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(
        DateTime(timezone=True), default=lambda: datetime.now(timezone.utc)
    )
    updated_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(
        DateTime(timezone=True),
        default=lambda: datetime.now(timezone.utc),
        onupdate=lambda: datetime.now(timezone.utc),
    )

from sqlalchemy import Text, DateTime, ForeignKey, JSON, Uuid
from sqlalchemy.dialects.postgresql import JSONB
from sqlalchemy.orm import Mapped, mapped_column
from app.models import Base

_JSON = JSON().with_variant(JSONB(), "postgresql")


class Campaign(Base):
    __tablename__ = "campaigns"

    id: Mapped[uuid.UUID] = mapped_column(Uuid(as_uuid=True), primary_key=True, default=uuid.uuid4)
    user_id: Mapped[uuid.UUID] = mapped_column(
        Uuid(as_uuid=True), ForeignKey("users.id"), nullable=False
    )
    type: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(Text, nullable=False)
    status: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(Text, default="draft", nullable=False)
    config_json: Mapped[dict] = mapped_column(JSONB, default=dict)
    created_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(
        DateTime(timezone=True), default=lambda: datetime.now(timezone.utc)
    )
    updated_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(
        DateTime(timezone=True),
        default=lambda: datetime.now(timezone.utc),
        onupdate=lambda: datetime.now(timezone.utc),

import pytest
import uuid
from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import create_async_engine, AsyncSession, async_sessionmaker
from httpx import AsyncClient, ASGITransport

from app.main import app
from app.models import Base
from app.deps import get_db, get_current_user
from app.models.user import User
from app.interfaces.llm_provider import AbstractLLMProvider
from app.services.llm_service import LLMService
from app.api.v1.campaigns import get_llm_service

TEST_DB_URL = "sqlite+aiosqlite:///:memory:"


class MockLLMProvider(AbstractLLMProvider):
    async def chat_completion(self, messages: list[dict], system_prompt: str, model: str) -> str:
        return "Mock response: tell me more about your goals."

    async def structured_completion(self, messages: list[dict], system_prompt: str, model: str) -> dict:
        return {"subject": "Mock Subject", "body": "Mock email body."}


def mock_llm_service() -> LLMService:
    return LLMService(provider=MockLLMProvider())


@pytest.fixture(scope="function")
async def db_engine():
    engine = create_async_engine(TEST_DB_URL, echo=False)
    async with engine.begin() as conn:
        await conn.run_sync(Base.metadata.create_all)
    yield engine
    await engine.dispose()


@pytest.fixture
async def db_session(db_engine):
    session_factory = async_sessionmaker(db_engine, expire_on_commit=False)
    async with session_factory() as session:
        yield session
        await session.rollback()


@pytest.fixture
async def test_user(db_session):
    user = User(id=uuid.uuid4(), email="test@example.com", auth_provider="google")
    db_session.add(user)
    await db_session.flush()
    return user


@pytest.fixture
async def client(db_session, test_user):
    async def override_get_db():
        yield db_session

    async def override_get_current_user():
        return test_user

    app.dependency_overrides[get_db] = override_get_db
    app.dependency_overrides[get_current_user] = override_get_current_user
    app.dependency_overrides[get_llm_service] = mock_llm_service

    async with AsyncClient(transport=ASGITransport(app=app), base_url="http://test") as c:
        yield c

    app.dependency_overrides.clear()

import pytest
import uuid
from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import create_async_engine, AsyncSession, async_sessionmaker
from httpx import AsyncClient, ASGITransport

from app.main import app
from app.models import Base
from app.deps import get_db, get_current_user
from app.models.user import User

TEST_DB_URL = "sqlite+aiosqlite:///:memory:"


@pytest.fixture(scope="function")
async def db_engine():
    engine = create_async_engine(TEST_DB_URL, echo=False)
    async with engine.begin() as conn:
        await conn.run_sync(Base.metadata.create_all)
    yield engine
    await engine.dispose()


@pytest.fixture
async def db_session(db_engine):
    session_factory = async_sessionmaker(db_engine, expire_on_commit=False)
    async with session_factory() as session:
        yield session
        await session.rollback()


@pytest.fixture
async def test_user(db_session):
    user = User(id=uuid.uuid4(), email="test@example.com", auth_provider="google")
    db_session.add(user)
    await db_session.flush()
    return user


@pytest.fixture
async def client(db_session, test_user):
    async def override_get_db():
        yield db_session

    async def override_get_current_user():
        return test_user

    app.dependency_overrides[get_db] = override_get_db
    app.dependency_overrides[get_current_user] = override_get_current_user

    async with AsyncClient(transport=ASGITransport(app=app), base_url="http://test") as c:
        yield c

    app.dependency_overrides.clear()

from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends
from fastapi.responses import StreamingResponse
from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession
from uuid import UUID
import json

from app.deps import get_db, get_current_user
from app.schemas.chat import ChatMessageRequest
from app.services.chat_service import ChatService
from app.repositories.campaign_repository import CampaignRepository
from app.services.llm_service import LLMService
from app.providers.llm.openai_provider import OpenAIProvider
from app.models.user import User

router = APIRouter(prefix="/campaigns", tags=["chat"])


@router.post("/{campaign_id}/chat")
async def send_chat_message(
    campaign_id: UUID,
    req: ChatMessageRequest,
    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
    user: User = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    llm = LLMService(provider=OpenAIProvider())
    chat_service = ChatService(CampaignRepository(db), llm)

    async def event_stream():
        extracted_params = {}
        async for chunk in chat_service.process_message(campaign_id, req.message, user.id):
            if chunk.startswith("\n\n__DONE__:"):
                try:
                    extracted_params = json.loads(chunk.replace("\n\n__DONE__:", ""))
                except Exception:
                    extracted_params = {}
                yield f"data: {json.dumps({'type': 'done', 'extracted_params': extracted_params})}\n\n"
            else:
                yield f"data: {json.dumps({'type': 'token', 'content': chunk})}\n\n"

    return StreamingResponse(event_stream(), media_type="text/event-stream")


@router.get("/{campaign_id}/chat")
async def get_chat_history(
    campaign_id: UUID,
    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
    user: User = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    llm = LLMService(provider=OpenAIProvider())
    chat_service = ChatService(CampaignRepository(db), llm)
    session = await chat_service.get_session(campaign_id)
    return {
        "session_id": session.id,
        "status": session.status,
        "chat_history": session.chat_history,
        "extracted_params": session.extracted_params,
    }


@router.get("/{campaign_id}/stream")
async def campaign_stream(
    campaign_id: UUID,
    user: User = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    from app.core.sse import subscribe, unsubscribe

    async def event_generator():
        q = subscribe(str(campaign_id))
        try:
            while True:
                event = await q.get()
                yield f"data: {json.dumps(event)}\n\n"
                if event.get("type") == "complete":
                    break
        finally:
            unsubscribe(str(campaign_id), q)

    return StreamingResponse(event_generator(), media_type="text/event-stream")

from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends
from fastapi.responses import StreamingResponse
from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession
from uuid import UUID
import json

from app.deps import get_db, get_current_user
from app.schemas.chat import ChatMessageRequest
from app.services.chat_service import ChatService
from app.repositories.campaign_repository import CampaignRepository
from app.services.llm_service import LLMService
from app.api.v1.campaigns import get_llm_service
from app.models.user import User

router = APIRouter(prefix="/campaigns", tags=["chat"])


@router.post("/{campaign_id}/chat")
async def send_chat_message(
    campaign_id: UUID,
    req: ChatMessageRequest,
    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
    user: User = Depends(get_current_user),
    llm: LLMService = Depends(get_llm_service),
):
    chat_service = ChatService(CampaignRepository(db), llm)

    async def event_stream():
        extracted_params = {}
        async for chunk in chat_service.process_message(campaign_id, req.message, user.id):
            if chunk.startswith("\n\n__DONE__:"):
                try:
                    extracted_params = json.loads(chunk.replace("\n\n__DONE__:", ""))
                except Exception:
                    extracted_params = {}
                yield f"data: {json.dumps({'type': 'done', 'extracted_params': extracted_params})}\n\n"
            else:
                yield f"data: {json.dumps({'type': 'token', 'content': chunk})}\n\n"

    return StreamingResponse(event_stream(), media_type="text/event-stream")


@router.get("/{campaign_id}/chat")
async def get_chat_history(
    campaign_id: UUID,
    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
    user: User = Depends(get_current_user),
    llm: LLMService = Depends(get_llm_service),
):
    chat_service = ChatService(CampaignRepository(db), llm)
    session = await chat_service.get_session(campaign_id)
    return {
        "session_id": session.id,
        "status": session.status,
        "chat_history": session.chat_history,
        "extracted_params": session.extracted_params,
    }


@router.get("/{campaign_id}/stream")
async def campaign_stream(
    campaign_id: UUID,
    user: User = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    from app.core.sse import subscribe, unsubscribe

    async def event_generator():
        q = subscribe(str(campaign_id))
        try:
            while True:
                event = await q.get()

from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends, Query
from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession
from uuid import UUID
from datetime import datetime, timezone

from app.deps import get_db, get_current_user
from app.schemas.outreach import PatchOutreachRequest
from app.repositories.email_job_repository import EmailJobRepository
from app.repositories.contact_repository import ContactRepository
from app.models.user import User

router = APIRouter(prefix="/campaigns", tags=["outreach"])


@router.get("/{campaign_id}/outreach")
async def list_outreach(
    campaign_id: UUID,
    page: int = Query(1, ge=1),
    limit: int = Query(50, ge=1, le=100),
    status: str | None = None,
    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
    user: User = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    repo = EmailJobRepository(db)
    contact_repo = ContactRepository(db)
    jobs, total = await repo.list_for_campaign(campaign_id, page, limit, status)

    outreaches = []
    for job in jobs:
        contact = await contact_repo.get_by_id(job.contact_id)
        outreaches.append(
            {
                "id": job.id,
                "contact": {
                    "company": contact.company if contact else "",
                    "person_name": contact.person_name if contact else None,
                    "email": contact.email if contact else str(job.contact_id),
                    "title": contact.title if contact else None,
                    "source": contact.source if contact else "apollo",
                    "bounce_risk": contact.bounce_risk if contact else False,
                },
                "subject": job.subject,
                "body": job.body,
                "draft_status": job.draft_status,
                "status": job.status,
            }
        )

    return {"outreaches": outreaches, "total": total, "page": page, "limit": limit}


@router.patch("/{campaign_id}/outreach/{outreach_id}")
async def patch_outreach(
    campaign_id: UUID,
    outreach_id: UUID,
    req: PatchOutreachRequest,
    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
    user: User = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    repo = EmailJobRepository(db)
    job = await repo.update_draft_status(outreach_id, req.draft_status, req.subject, req.body)
    await db.commit()
    return {
        "id": job.id,
        "draft_status": job.draft_status,
        "updated_at": datetime.now(timezone.utc),
    }

from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends, BackgroundTasks
from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession
from sqlalchemy import select
from uuid import UUID

from app.deps import get_db, get_current_user
from app.schemas.email_job import EnqueueEmailsRequest
from app.repositories.email_job_repository import EmailJobRepository
from app.models.user import User
from app.models.email_job import EmailJob
from app.models.contact import Contact

router = APIRouter(prefix="/campaigns", tags=["email_jobs"])


@router.post("/{campaign_id}/email-jobs", status_code=202)
async def enqueue_emails(
    campaign_id: UUID,
    req: EnqueueEmailsRequest,
    background_tasks: BackgroundTasks,
    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
    user: User = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    repo = EmailJobRepository(db)

    if req.outreach_ids == "all":
        jobs = await repo.list_approved(campaign_id)
    else:
        jobs = await repo.get_by_ids(req.outreach_ids)

    queued = 0
    skipped = 0
    for job in jobs:
        from app.repositories.contact_repository import ContactRepository

        contact_repo = ContactRepository(db)
        contact = await contact_repo.get_by_id(job.contact_id)
        if contact and contact.bounce_risk:
            skipped += 1
            continue
        await repo.update_status(job.id, "queued")
        from app.tasks.email_task import send_email_job
        from app.deps import AsyncSessionLocal

        background_tasks.add_task(send_email_job, job.id, AsyncSessionLocal)
        queued += 1

    await db.commit()
    return {
        "queued": queued,
        "skipped_bounced": skipped,
        "message": f"{queued} emails queued. Sending at 1 email/sec to stay within Gmail limits.",
    }


@router.get("/{campaign_id}/email-jobs")
async def list_email_jobs(
    campaign_id: UUID,
    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
    user: User = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    result = await db.execute(
        select(EmailJob, Contact)
        .join(Contact, EmailJob.contact_id == Contact.id)
        .where(EmailJob.campaign_id == campaign_id)
    )
    rows = result.all()
    jobs = [
        {
            "id": job.id,
            "contact_email": contact.email,
            "subject": job.subject,
            "status": job.status,
            "sent_at": job.sent_at,
        }
        for job, contact in rows
    ]
    return {"jobs": jobs, "total": len(jobs)}

23	        self, campaign_id: UUID, message: str, user_id: UUID
24	    ) -> AsyncGenerator[str, None]:

46	            await self.llm_service.extract_params(
47	                history, campaign.type if campaign else "b2b"
48	            )
49	            yield "\n\n__DONE__:{}"
50	        except Exception:
51	            yield "\n\n__DONE__:{}"

54	        session = await self.campaign_repo.get_session(campaign_id)

from uuid import UUID
from typing import AsyncGenerator
from app.repositories.campaign_repository import CampaignRepository
from app.services.llm_service import LLMService
from app.core.exceptions import NotFoundError
from app.models.campaign_session import CampaignSession

CHAT_SYSTEM_PROMPT = """You are an AI assistant helping users create personalized email outreach campaigns.
Your goal is to understand:
1. Who they want to reach (target companies, titles, geography)
2. What they want to say (purpose, value proposition)
3. Their preferred tools (email source: apollo/scrape, AI provider: openai/anthropic/gemini)

Ask clarifying questions naturally. Once you have enough information, confirm the details."""


class ChatService:
    def __init__(self, campaign_repo: CampaignRepository, llm_service: LLMService):
        self.campaign_repo = campaign_repo
        self.llm_service = llm_service

    async def process_message(
        self, campaign_id: UUID, message: str, user_id: UUID
    ) -> AsyncGenerator[str, None]:
        session = await self.campaign_repo.get_session(campaign_id)
        if not session:
            raise NotFoundError(f"Session for campaign {campaign_id} not found")

        history = list(session.chat_history or [])
        history.append({"role": "user", "content": message})

        response = await self.llm_service.chat_completion(history, CHAT_SYSTEM_PROMPT)

        history.append({"role": "assistant", "content": response})
        session.chat_history = history
        await self.campaign_repo.update(session)

        # Stream response word by word
        words = response.split()
        for i, word in enumerate(words):
            yield word + (" " if i < len(words) - 1 else "")

        # After streaming, attempt param extraction
        try:
            campaign = await self.campaign_repo.get_by_id(campaign_id)
            await self.llm_service.extract_params(
                history, campaign.type if campaign else "b2b"
            )
            yield "\n\n__DONE__:{}"
        except Exception:
            yield "\n\n__DONE__:{}"

    async def get_session(self, campaign_id: UUID) -> CampaignSession:
        session = await self.campaign_repo.get_session(campaign_id)
        if not session:
            raise NotFoundError(f"Session for campaign {campaign_id} not found")
        return session

    async def finalize_session(
        self, campaign_id: UUID, extracted_params: dict
    ) -> CampaignSession:
        session = await self.campaign_repo.get_session(campaign_id)
        if not session:
            raise NotFoundError(f"Session for campaign {campaign_id} not found")
        session.extracted_params = extracted_params
        session.status = "completed"
        return await self.campaign_repo.update(session)

from uuid import UUID
from sqlalchemy import select, update, func
from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession
from app.repositories.base import AsyncBaseRepository
from app.models.email_job import EmailJob
from datetime import datetime, timezone


class EmailJobRepository(AsyncBaseRepository[EmailJob]):
    def __init__(self, session: AsyncSession):
        super().__init__(session, EmailJob)

    async def list_for_campaign(
        self,
        campaign_id: UUID,
        page: int = 1,
        limit: int = 50,
        status: str | None = None,
    ) -> tuple[list[EmailJob], int]:
        query = select(EmailJob).where(EmailJob.campaign_id == campaign_id)
        if status:
            query = query.where(EmailJob.status == status)

        count_result = await self.session.scalar(
            select(func.count())
            .select_from(EmailJob)
            .where(EmailJob.campaign_id == campaign_id)
        )

        result = await self.session.execute(query.offset((page - 1) * limit).limit(limit))
        return list(result.scalars().all()), count_result or 0

    async def list_approved(self, campaign_id: UUID) -> list[EmailJob]:
        result = await self.session.execute(
            select(EmailJob).where(
                EmailJob.campaign_id == campaign_id, EmailJob.draft_status == "approved"
            )
        )
        return list(result.scalars().all())

    async def get_by_ids(self, ids: list[UUID]) -> list[EmailJob]:
        result = await self.session.execute(select(EmailJob).where(EmailJob.id.in_(ids)))
        return list(result.scalars().all())

    async def update_draft_status(
        self,
        id: UUID,
        draft_status: str | None,
        subject: str | None = None,
        body: str | None = None,
    ) -> EmailJob:
        values = {}
        if draft_status:
            values["draft_status"] = draft_status
        if subject:
            values["subject"] = subject
        if body:
            values["body"] = body
        if values:
            await self.session.execute(
                update(EmailJob).where(EmailJob.id == id).values(**values)
            )
            await self.session.flush()
        job = await self.get_by_id(id)
        return job

    async def mark_sent(self, id: UUID, gmail_message_id: str) -> None:
        await self.session.execute(
            update(EmailJob)
            .where(EmailJob.id == id)
            .values(
                status="sent",
                gmail_message_id=gmail_message_id,
                sent_at=datetime.now(timezone.utc),
            )
        )
        await self.session.flush()

    async def mark_failed(self, id: UUID, error: str) -> None:
        await self.session.execute(
            update(EmailJob).where(EmailJob.id == id).values(status="failed", last_error=error)
        )
        await self.session.flush()

    async def update_status(self, id: UUID, status: str) -> None:
        await self.session.execute(
            update(EmailJob).where(EmailJob.id == id).values(status=status)
        )
        await self.session.flush()

from uuid import UUID
from app.repositories.campaign_repository import CampaignRepository
from app.repositories.contact_repository import ContactRepository
from app.repositories.email_job_repository import EmailJobRepository
from app.services.llm_service import LLMService
from app.models.contact import Contact
from app.models.email_job import EmailJob


class ProcessorService:
    def __init__(
        self,
        campaign_repo: CampaignRepository,
        contact_repo: ContactRepository,
        email_job_repo: EmailJobRepository,
        llm_service: LLMService,
    ):
        self.campaign_repo = campaign_repo
        self.contact_repo = contact_repo
        self.email_job_repo = email_job_repo
        self.llm_service = llm_service

    async def process_campaign(self, campaign_id: UUID, user_id: UUID) -> int:
        """Process a campaign: fetch contacts, generate emails, create email jobs."""
        session = await self.campaign_repo.get_session(campaign_id)
        if not session:
            return 0

        params = session.extracted_params or {}
        campaign = await self.campaign_repo.get_by_id_for_user(campaign_id, user_id)
        if not campaign:
            return 0

        # For now, generate stub contacts from session params
        stub_contacts = self._generate_stub_contacts(campaign_id, params)
        contacts = await self.contact_repo.bulk_create(stub_contacts)

        # Generate email drafts
        sender_profile = {"email": "sender@example.com"}
        jobs = []
        for contact in contacts:
            contact_dict = {
                "company": contact.company,
                "person_name": contact.person_name,
                "email": contact.email,
                "title": contact.title,
            }
            try:
                email_draft = await self.llm_service.generate_email(
                    contact_dict, params, sender_profile
                )
                job = EmailJob(
                    campaign_id=campaign_id,
                    contact_id=contact.id,
                    subject=email_draft.get("subject", ""),
                    body=email_draft.get("body", ""),
                    draft_status="pending",
                    status="draft",
                )
            except Exception:
                job = EmailJob(
                    campaign_id=campaign_id,
                    contact_id=contact.id,
                    draft_status="pending",
                    status="draft",
                )
            jobs.append(job)

        await self.email_job_repo.bulk_create(jobs)
        await self.campaign_repo.update_status(campaign_id, "ready")
        return len(jobs)

    def _generate_stub_contacts(self, campaign_id: UUID, params: dict) -> list[Contact]:
        strategy = params.get("target_strategy", "General outreach")
        return [
            Contact(
                campaign_id=campaign_id,
                company="Example Corp",
                person_name="Jane Doe",
                email="jane@example.com",
                title="CTO",
                source="apollo",
                bounce_risk=False,
            )
        ]

import asyncio
from uuid import UUID
from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import async_sessionmaker, AsyncSession

from app.core.sse import publish


async def run_processor(
    campaign_id: UUID,
    user_id: UUID,
    session_factory: async_sessionmaker,
) -> None:
    """Run the campaign processor as a background task."""
    semaphore = asyncio.Semaphore(20)

    async with session_factory() as session:
        try:
            from app.repositories.campaign_repository import CampaignRepository
            from app.repositories.contact_repository import ContactRepository
            from app.repositories.email_job_repository import EmailJobRepository
            from app.services.llm_service import LLMService
            from app.providers.llm.openai_provider import OpenAIProvider
            from app.services.processor_service import ProcessorService

            llm_service = LLMService(provider=OpenAIProvider())
            campaign_repo = CampaignRepository(session)
            contact_repo = ContactRepository(session)
            email_job_repo = EmailJobRepository(session)

            processor = ProcessorService(
                campaign_repo=campaign_repo,
                contact_repo=contact_repo,
                email_job_repo=email_job_repo,
                llm_service=llm_service,
            )

            async with semaphore:
                count = await processor.process_campaign(campaign_id, user_id)
                await session.commit()

            await publish(
                str(campaign_id),
                {
                    "type": "progress",
                    "message": f"Generated {count} email drafts",
                    "count": count,
                },
            )
            await publish(
                str(campaign_id),
                {"type": "complete", "message": "Campaign processing complete", "count": count},
            )

        except Exception as e:
            await session.rollback()
            try:
                from app.repositories.campaign_repository import CampaignRepository

                async with session_factory() as recovery_session:
                    repo = CampaignRepository(recovery_session)
                    await repo.update_status(campaign_id, "failed")
                    await recovery_session.commit()
            except Exception:
                pass

            await publish(
                str(campaign_id),
                {"type": "error", "message": f"Processing failed: {str(e)}"},
            )

from typing import Generic, TypeVar
from uuid import UUID
from sqlalchemy import select
from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession

T = TypeVar("T")


class AsyncBaseRepository(Generic[T]):
    def __init__(self, session: AsyncSession, model: type[T]) -> None:
        self.session = session
        self.model = model

    async def get_by_id(self, id: UUID | str) -> T | None:
        if isinstance(id, str):
            id = UUID(id)
        result = await self.session.execute(select(self.model).where(self.model.id == id))
        return result.scalar_one_or_none()

    async def create(self, obj: T) -> T:
        self.session.add(obj)
        await self.session.flush()
        await self.session.refresh(obj)
        return obj

    async def update(self, obj: T) -> T:
        await self.session.flush()
        await self.session.refresh(obj)
        return obj

    async def bulk_create(self, objs: list[T]) -> list[T]:
        self.session.add_all(objs)
        await self.session.flush()
        return objs

        contact_id=contact.id,
        subject="Subject",

        status="draft",

    db_session.add(job)
    await db_session.flush()

from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends
from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession

from app.core.google_oauth import get_auth_url, exchange_code, get_user_info
from app.core.security import create_access_token
from app.repositories.user_repository import UserRepository
from app.models.user import User
from app.deps import get_db

router = APIRouter(prefix="/auth", tags=["auth"])


@router.post("/google")
async def google_auth_init():
    auth_url = get_auth_url()
    return {"auth_url": auth_url}


@router.get("/google/callback")
async def google_callback(
    code: str, state: str = "", db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db)
):
    tokens = await exchange_code(code)
    user_info = await get_user_info(tokens["access_token"])

    user_repo = UserRepository(db)
    user = await user_repo.get_by_google_id(user_info["sub"])

    if not user:
        user = await user_repo.get_by_email(user_info["email"])

    if not user:
        user = User(
            email=user_info["email"],
            google_id=user_info["sub"],
            auth_provider="google",
            google_profile=user_info,
            gmail_oauth_token={
                "access_token": tokens["access_token"],
                "refresh_token": tokens.get("refresh_token"),
            },
        )
        user = await user_repo.create(user)
        await db.commit()
    else:
        user.gmail_oauth_token = {
            "access_token": tokens["access_token"],
            "refresh_token": tokens.get("refresh_token"),
        }
        user.google_id = user_info["sub"]
        await db.commit()

    access_token = create_access_token(user.id, user.email)
    return {
        "access_token": access_token,
        "token_type": "bearer",
        "user": {"id": str(user.id), "email": user.email},
    }

import pytest


async def test_get_chat_history_has_initial_message(client):
    create_resp = await client.post("/api/v1/campaigns", json={"type": "job_outreach"})
    campaign_id = create_resp.json()["campaign_id"]
    resp = await client.get(f"/api/v1/campaigns/{campaign_id}/chat")
    assert resp.status_code == 200
    data = resp.json()
    assert len(data["chat_history"]) >= 1
    assert data["chat_history"][0]["role"] == "assistant"


async def test_finalize_session_accepts_params(client):
    create_resp = await client.post("/api/v1/campaigns", json={"type": "job_outreach"})
    campaign_id = create_resp.json()["campaign_id"]
    resp = await client.put(
        f"/api/v1/campaigns/{campaign_id}/sessions",
        json={
            "extracted_params": {
                "geography": ["US"],
                "target_strategy": "CTOs at Series B",
            }
        },
    )
    assert resp.status_code == 202

**Issue 2: No campaign ownership check in outreach/email_jobs**
**Issue 3: `processor_task` hard-codes `OpenAIProvider`**
**Issue 4: Default `SECRET_KEY` too short**
**Issue 5: Auth callback missing refresh token in response**

from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends
from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession

from app.core.google_oauth import get_auth_url, exchange_code, get_user_info
from app.core.security import create_access_token, create_refresh_token
from app.repositories.user_repository import UserRepository
from app.services.auth_service import AuthService
from app.deps import get_db

router = APIRouter(prefix="/auth", tags=["auth"])


def get_auth_service(db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db)) -> AuthService:
    return AuthService(UserRepository(db))


@router.post("/google")
async def google_auth_init():
    auth_url = get_auth_url()
    return {"auth_url": auth_url}


@router.get("/google/callback")
async def google_callback(
    code: str,
    state: str = "",
    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
    auth_service: AuthService = Depends(get_auth_service),
):
    tokens = await exchange_code(code)
    user_info = await get_user_info(tokens["access_token"])

    user, _created = await auth_service.get_or_create_google_user(user_info, tokens)
    await db.commit()

    access_token = create_access_token(user.id, user.email)
    refresh_token = create_refresh_token(user.id)
    return {
        "access_token": access_token,
        "refresh_token": refresh_token,
        "token_type": "bearer",
        "user": {"id": str(user.id), "email": user.email},
    }

from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends
from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession

from app.core.google_oauth import get_auth_url, exchange_code, get_user_info
from app.core.security import create_access_token
from app.repositories.user_repository import UserRepository
from app.models.user import User
from app.deps import get_db

router = APIRouter(prefix="/auth", tags=["auth"])


@router.post("/google")
async def google_auth_init():
    auth_url = get_auth_url()
    return {"auth_url": auth_url}


@router.get("/google/callback")
async def google_callback(
    code: str, state: str = "", db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db)
):
    tokens = await exchange_code(code)
    user_info = await get_user_info(tokens["access_token"])

    user_repo = UserRepository(db)
    user = await user_repo.get_by_google_id(user_info["sub"])

    if not user:
        user = await user_repo.get_by_email(user_info["email"])

    if not user:
        user = User(
            email=user_info["email"],
            google_id=user_info["sub"],
            auth_provider="google",
            google_profile=user_info,
            gmail_oauth_token={
                "access_token": tokens["access_token"],
                "refresh_token": tokens.get("refresh_token"),
            },
        )
        user = await user_repo.create(user)
        await db.commit()
    else:
        user.gmail_oauth_token = {
            "access_token": tokens["access_token"],
            "refresh_token": tokens.get("refresh_token"),
        }
        user.google_id = user_info["sub"]
        await db.commit()

    access_token = create_access_token(user.id, user.email)
    return {
        "access_token": access_token,
        "token_type": "bearer",
        "user": {"id": str(user.id), "email": user.email},

from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends, Query
from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession
from uuid import UUID
from datetime import datetime, timezone

from app.deps import get_db, get_current_user
from app.schemas.outreach import PatchOutreachRequest
from app.repositories.email_job_repository import EmailJobRepository
from app.repositories.contact_repository import ContactRepository
from app.models.user import User

router = APIRouter(prefix="/campaigns", tags=["outreach"])


@router.get("/{campaign_id}/outreach")
async def list_outreach(
    campaign_id: UUID,
    page: int = Query(1, ge=1),
    limit: int = Query(50, ge=1, le=100),
    status: str | None = None,
    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
    user: User = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    repo = EmailJobRepository(db)
    contact_repo = ContactRepository(db)
    jobs, total = await repo.list_for_campaign(campaign_id, page, limit, status)

    outreaches = []
    for job in jobs:
        contact = await contact_repo.get_by_id(job.contact_id)
        outreaches.append(
            {
                "id": job.id,
                "contact": {
                    "company": contact.company if contact else "",
                    "person_name": contact.person_name if contact else None,
                    "email": contact.email if contact else str(job.contact_id),
                    "title": contact.title if contact else None,
                    "source": contact.source if contact else "apollo",
                    "bounce_risk": contact.bounce_risk if contact else False,
                },
                "subject": job.subject,
                "body": job.body,
                "draft_status": job.draft_status,
                "status": job.status,
            }
        )

    return {"outreaches": outreaches, "total": total, "page": page, "limit": limit}


@router.patch("/{campaign_id}/outreach/{outreach_id}")
async def patch_outreach(
    campaign_id: UUID,
    outreach_id: UUID,
    req: PatchOutreachRequest,
    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
    user: User = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    repo = EmailJobRepository(db)
    job = await repo.update_draft_status(outreach_id, req.draft_status, req.subject, req.body)
    await db.commit()
    return {
        "id": job.id,
        "draft_status": job.draft_status,
        "updated_at": datetime.now(timezone.utc),
    }

from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends, Query
from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession
from uuid import UUID
from datetime import datetime, timezone

from app.deps import get_db, get_current_user
from app.schemas.outreach import PatchOutreachRequest
from app.repositories.email_job_repository import EmailJobRepository
from app.repositories.contact_repository import ContactRepository
from app.repositories.campaign_repository import CampaignRepository
from app.models.user import User
from app.core.exceptions import NotFoundError

router = APIRouter(prefix="/campaigns", tags=["outreach"])


async def _require_campaign(campaign_id: UUID, user_id, db: AsyncSession):
    repo = CampaignRepository(db)
    campaign = await repo.get_by_id_for_user(campaign_id, user_id)
    if not campaign:
        raise NotFoundError(f"Campaign {campaign_id} not found")
    return campaign


@router.get("/{campaign_id}/outreach")
async def list_outreach(
    campaign_id: UUID,
    page: int = Query(1, ge=1),
    limit: int = Query(50, ge=1, le=100),
    status: str | None = None,
    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
    user: User = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    await _require_campaign(campaign_id, user.id, db)
    repo = EmailJobRepository(db)
    contact_repo = ContactRepository(db)
    jobs, total = await repo.list_for_campaign(campaign_id, page, limit, status)

    outreaches = []
    for job in jobs:
        contact = await contact_repo.get_by_id(job.contact_id)
        outreaches.append(
            {
                "id": job.id,
                "contact": {
                    "company": contact.company if contact else "",
                    "person_name": contact.person_name if contact else None,
                    "email": contact.email if contact else str(job.contact_id),
                    "title": contact.title if contact else None,
                    "source": contact.source if contact else "apollo",
                    "bounce_risk": contact.bounce_risk if contact else False,
                },
                "subject": job.subject,
                "body": job.body,
                "draft_status": job.draft_status,
                "status": job.status,
            }
        )

    return {"outreaches": outreaches, "total": total, "page": page, "limit": limit}


@router.patch("/{campaign_id}/outreach/{outreach_id}")
async def patch_outreach(
    campaign_id: UUID,
    outreach_id: UUID,
    req: PatchOutreachRequest,
    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
    user: User = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    repo = EmailJobRepository(db)
    job = await repo.update_draft_status(outreach_id, req.draft_status, req.subject, req.body)
    await db.commit()
    return {
        "id": job.id,
        "draft_status": job.draft_status,
        "updated_at": datetime.now(timezone.utc),
    }

from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends, BackgroundTasks
from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession
from sqlalchemy import select
from uuid import UUID

from app.deps import get_db, get_current_user
from app.schemas.email_job import EnqueueEmailsRequest
from app.repositories.email_job_repository import EmailJobRepository
from app.models.user import User
from app.models.email_job import EmailJob
from app.models.contact import Contact

router = APIRouter(prefix="/campaigns", tags=["email_jobs"])


@router.post("/{campaign_id}/email-jobs", status_code=202)
async def enqueue_emails(
    campaign_id: UUID,
    req: EnqueueEmailsRequest,
    background_tasks: BackgroundTasks,
    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
    user: User = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    repo = EmailJobRepository(db)

    if req.outreach_ids == "all":
        jobs = await repo.list_approved(campaign_id)
    else:
        jobs = await repo.get_by_ids(req.outreach_ids)

    queued = 0
    skipped = 0
    for job in jobs:
        from app.repositories.contact_repository import ContactRepository

        contact_repo = ContactRepository(db)
        contact = await contact_repo.get_by_id(job.contact_id)
        if contact and contact.bounce_risk:
            skipped += 1
            continue
        await repo.update_status(job.id, "queued")
        from app.tasks.email_task import send_email_job
        from app.deps import AsyncSessionLocal

        background_tasks.add_task(send_email_job, job.id, AsyncSessionLocal)
        queued += 1

    await db.commit()
    return {
        "queued": queued,
        "skipped_bounced": skipped,
        "message": f"{queued} emails queued. Sending at 1 email/sec to stay within Gmail limits.",
    }


@router.get("/{campaign_id}/email-jobs")
async def list_email_jobs(
    campaign_id: UUID,
    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
    user: User = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    result = await db.execute(
        select(EmailJob, Contact)
        .join(Contact, EmailJob.contact_id == Contact.id)
        .where(EmailJob.campaign_id == campaign_id)
    )
    rows = result.all()
    jobs = [
        {
            "id": job.id,
            "contact_email": contact.email,
            "subject": job.subject,
            "status": job.status,
            "sent_at": job.sent_at,
        }
        for job, contact in rows
    ]
    return {"jobs": jobs, "total": len(jobs)}

/Users/tanishqsingh/.zshenv:.:1: no such file or directory: /Users/tanishqsingh/.cargo/env
(Use `node --trace-deprecation ...` to show where the warning was created)
I've performed a devil's advocate review of the provided backend. The architecture is currently a "distributed monolith" that will fail under production load or multi-worker scaling.

### **CRITICAL SEVERITY**

1.  **Security: Wide-Open CORS (`app/main.py`)**
    The app uses `allow_origins=["*"]`. This is a massive security hole. It allows any malicious website to make requests to your API. If a user is logged into the platform and visits a malicious site, that site can hijack their session.
2.  **Architecture: Distributed State Failure (`app/core/sse.py`)**
    The SSE implementation uses a local Python `dict` and `asyncio.Queue`. This **will not work** in production. In a standard FastAPI setup (multiple Gunicorn/Uvicorn workers), worker A will not know about the subscribers on worker B. If a campaign finishes on worker A, worker B's clients will never get the notification. You need Redis Pub/Sub.
3.  **Reliability: In-Memory Task Loss**
    Using FastAPI's `BackgroundTasks` for `run_processor` and `send_email_job` is extremely risky. These tasks live only in the RAM of the current process. If the server restarts (deploy, crash, OOM), all pending emails and processing campaigns are **permanently lost** with no record of what was missed. You need a persistent worker (Celery/RabbitMQ/SQS).

### **HIGH SEVERITY**

1.  **Performance: The N+1 Query Disaster**
    *   `app/api/v1/outreach.py`: Inside `list_outreach`, you call `contact_repo.get_by_id` inside a loop for every job. Fetching 100 outreaches results in 101 database queries.
    *   `app/api/v1/email_jobs.py`: `enqueue_emails` does the same.
    *   **Fix:** Use a SQL `JOIN` or an `IN` clause to fetch all contacts in one query.
2.  **Performance: Sequential LLM I/O (`app/services/processor_service.py`)**
    `process_campaign` uses a `for contact in contacts` loop to call the LLM. If you have 50 contacts and each LLM call takes 2 seconds, the task takes 100 seconds and blocks that worker. This should use `asyncio.gather` with a semaphore to process batches in parallel.
3.  **Robustness: Brittle LLM Parsing (`app/api/v1/chat.py`)**
    The logic `chunk.startswith("\n\n__DONE__:")` is incredibly fragile. LLMs are non-deterministic. If the LLM adds a leading space, uses a different newline character, or fails to output that exact string, your parameter extraction logic breaks or leaks internal control strings to the user.
4.  **Scaling: Broken Rate Limiting (`app/tasks/email_task.py`)**
    `await asyncio.sleep(1)` inside the task does **not** rate limit the system. If you queue 100 emails, 100 tasks are spawned; they all sleep for 1 second *at the same time* and then all hit the Gmail API/DB simultaneously. You need a centralized rate-limited queue.

### **MEDIUM SEVERITY**

1.  **Error Handling: Generic Auth Catch (`app/deps.py`)**
    `get_current_user` catches **all** `Exception`s and returns a 401. If your database goes down or your `UserRepository` has a bug, the API will tell the user "Invalid Token." This makes production debugging a nightmare.
2.  **Security: Missing URL Encoding (`app/core/google_oauth.py`)**
    You are manually joining query strings (`"&".join(...)`). If any parameter (like `redirect_uri`) contains a `&` or `=`, your OAuth URL will be malformed and the flow will fail. Use `httpx.QueryParams` or `urllib.parse.urlencode`.
3.  **Design: Local Import Smells**
    Using `from app.repositories... import ...` inside functions (seen in `tasks/`) to avoid circular imports is a sign of poor architectural layering. It makes the code harder to test and indicates that your service/repository boundaries are confused.

### **LOW SEVERITY**

1.  **Resource Waste:** New `httpx.AsyncClient()` created for every Google API call instead of using a singleton/dependency-injected client.
2.  **Sensitive Data:** Raw OAuth tokens stored in `JSONB` without encryption at rest.

**Verdict:** The code is functional as a prototype but is **not production-ready**. The SSE and BackgroundTask issues are the most immediate deal-breakers for a scalable system.

import httpx
from app.config import settings

GOOGLE_AUTH_URL = "https://accounts.google.com/o/oauth2/v2/auth"
GOOGLE_TOKEN_URL = "https://oauth2.googleapis.com/token"
GOOGLE_USERINFO_URL = "https://www.googleapis.com/oauth2/v3/userinfo"


def get_auth_url(state: str = "") -> str:
    params = {
        "client_id": settings.GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID,
        "redirect_uri": settings.GOOGLE_REDIRECT_URI,
        "response_type": "code",
        "scope": "openid email profile",
        "access_type": "offline",
        "state": state,
    }
    query = "&".join(f"{k}={v}" for k, v in params.items())
    return f"{GOOGLE_AUTH_URL}?{query}"


async def exchange_code(code: str) -> dict:
    async with httpx.AsyncClient() as client:
        resp = await client.post(
            GOOGLE_TOKEN_URL,
            data={
                "code": code,
                "client_id": settings.GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID,
                "client_secret": settings.GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET,
                "redirect_uri": settings.GOOGLE_REDIRECT_URI,
                "grant_type": "authorization_code",
            },
        )
        resp.raise_for_status()
        return resp.json()


async def get_user_info(access_token: str) -> dict:
    async with httpx.AsyncClient() as client:
        resp = await client.get(
            GOOGLE_USERINFO_URL, headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {access_token}"}
        )
        resp.raise_for_status()
        return resp.json()

import structlog
from fastapi import FastAPI, Request
from fastapi.middleware.cors import CORSMiddleware
from fastapi.responses import JSONResponse

from app.core.exceptions import AppError
from app.api.v1 import auth, campaigns, chat, outreach, email_jobs

logger = structlog.get_logger()

app = FastAPI(
    title="Outreach AI Platform",
    description="AI-powered email outreach platform API",
    version="0.1.0",
)

# CORS middleware
app.add_middleware(
    CORSMiddleware,
    allow_origins=["*"],
    allow_credentials=True,
    allow_methods=["*"],
    allow_headers=["*"],
)


@app.exception_handler(AppError)
async def app_error_handler(request: Request, exc: AppError) -> JSONResponse:
    logger.error(
        "app_error",
        code=exc.code,
        message=exc.message,
        status=exc.status,
        path=request.url.path,
    )
    return JSONResponse(
        status_code=exc.status,
        content={
            "error": {
                "code": exc.code,
                "message": exc.message,
                "details": exc.details,
            }
        },
    )


@app.exception_handler(Exception)
async def generic_error_handler(request: Request, exc: Exception) -> JSONResponse:
    logger.error("unhandled_error", error=str(exc), path=request.url.path)
    return JSONResponse(
        status_code=500,
        content={"error": {"code": "INTERNAL_ERROR", "message": "An unexpected error occurred"}},
    )


# Mount API routers
api_prefix = "/api/v1"
app.include_router(auth.router, prefix=api_prefix)
app.include_router(campaigns.router, prefix=api_prefix)
app.include_router(chat.router, prefix=api_prefix)
app.include_router(outreach.router, prefix=api_prefix)
app.include_router(email_jobs.router, prefix=api_prefix)


@app.get("/health")
async def health_check():
    return {"status": "ok", "version": "0.1.0"}

from pydantic_settings import BaseSettings, SettingsConfigDict


class Settings(BaseSettings):
    model_config = SettingsConfigDict(env_file=".env", extra="ignore")

    APP_ENV: str = "development"
    SECRET_KEY: str = "dev-secret-change-in-prod"
    JWT_ALGORITHM: str = "HS256"
    ACCESS_TOKEN_EXPIRE_MINUTES: int = 60
    REFRESH_TOKEN_EXPIRE_DAYS: int = 30

    DATABASE_URL: str = "postgresql+asyncpg://outreach:outreach@localhost:5432/outreach_db"

    OPENAI_API_KEY: str = ""
    ANTHROPIC_API_KEY: str = ""
    DEFAULT_LLM_PROVIDER: str = "openai"
    DEFAULT_LLM_MODEL: str = "gpt-4o"

    APOLLO_API_KEY: str = ""

    GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID: str = ""
    GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET: str = ""
    GOOGLE_REDIRECT_URI: str = "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/auth/google/callback"

    GMAIL_DAILY_SEND_LIMIT: int = 450
    EMAIL_SEND_RATE_PER_SECOND: int = 1
    PROCESSOR_MAX_CONCURRENCY: int = 20


settings = Settings()


def get_settings() -> Settings:
    return settings

from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends, Query
from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession
from sqlalchemy import select
from uuid import UUID
from datetime import datetime, timezone

from app.deps import get_db, get_current_user
from app.schemas.outreach import PatchOutreachRequest
from app.repositories.email_job_repository import EmailJobRepository
from app.repositories.campaign_repository import CampaignRepository
from app.models.user import User
from app.models.email_job import EmailJob
from app.models.contact import Contact
from app.core.exceptions import NotFoundError

router = APIRouter(prefix="/campaigns", tags=["outreach"])


async def _require_campaign(campaign_id: UUID, user_id, db: AsyncSession):
    repo = CampaignRepository(db)
    campaign = await repo.get_by_id_for_user(campaign_id, user_id)
    if not campaign:
        raise NotFoundError(f"Campaign {campaign_id} not found")
    return campaign


@router.get("/{campaign_id}/outreach")
async def list_outreach(
    campaign_id: UUID,
    page: int = Query(1, ge=1),
    limit: int = Query(50, ge=1, le=100),
    status: str | None = None,
    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
    user: User = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    await _require_campaign(campaign_id, user.id, db)

    query = (
        select(EmailJob, Contact)
        .join(Contact, EmailJob.contact_id == Contact.id)
        .where(EmailJob.campaign_id == campaign_id)
    )
    if status:
        query = query.where(EmailJob.status == status)

    total_result = await db.execute(
        select(EmailJob).where(EmailJob.campaign_id == campaign_id)
    )
    total = len(total_result.scalars().all())

    result = await db.execute(query.offset((page - 1) * limit).limit(limit))
    rows = result.all()

    outreaches = [
        {
            "id": job.id,
            "contact": {
                "company": contact.company,
                "person_name": contact.person_name,
                "email": contact.email,
                "title": contact.title,
                "source": contact.source,
                "bounce_risk": contact.bounce_risk,
            },
            "subject": job.subject,
            "body": job.body,
            "draft_status": job.draft_status,
            "status": job.status,
        }
        for job, contact in rows
    ]

    return {"outreaches": outreaches, "total": total, "page": page, "limit": limit}


@router.patch("/{campaign_id}/outreach/{outreach_id}")
async def patch_outreach(
    campaign_id: UUID,
    outreach_id: UUID,
    req: PatchOutreachRequest,
    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
    user: User = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    await _require_campaign(campaign_id, user.id, db)
    repo = EmailJobRepository(db)
    job = await repo.update_draft_status(outreach_id, req.draft_status, req.subject, req.body)
    await db.commit()
    return {
        "id": job.id,
        "draft_status": job.draft_status,
        "updated_at": datetime.now(timezone.utc),
    }

from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends, Query
from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession
from uuid import UUID
from datetime import datetime, timezone

from app.deps import get_db, get_current_user
from app.schemas.outreach import PatchOutreachRequest
from app.repositories.email_job_repository import EmailJobRepository
from app.repositories.contact_repository import ContactRepository
from app.repositories.campaign_repository import CampaignRepository
from app.models.user import User
from app.core.exceptions import NotFoundError

router = APIRouter(prefix="/campaigns", tags=["outreach"])


async def _require_campaign(campaign_id: UUID, user_id, db: AsyncSession):
    repo = CampaignRepository(db)
    campaign = await repo.get_by_id_for_user(campaign_id, user_id)
    if not campaign:
        raise NotFoundError(f"Campaign {campaign_id} not found")
    return campaign


@router.get("/{campaign_id}/outreach")
async def list_outreach(
    campaign_id: UUID,
    page: int = Query(1, ge=1),
    limit: int = Query(50, ge=1, le=100),
    status: str | None = None,
    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
    user: User = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    await _require_campaign(campaign_id, user.id, db)
    repo = EmailJobRepository(db)
    contact_repo = ContactRepository(db)
    jobs, total = await repo.list_for_campaign(campaign_id, page, limit, status)

    outreaches = []
    for job in jobs:
        contact = await contact_repo.get_by_id(job.contact_id)
        outreaches.append(
            {
                "id": job.id,
                "contact": {
                    "company": contact.company if contact else "",
                    "person_name": contact.person_name if contact else None,
                    "email": contact.email if contact else str(job.contact_id),
                    "title": contact.title if contact else None,
                    "source": contact.source if contact else "apollo",
                    "bounce_risk": contact.bounce_risk if contact else False,
                },
                "subject": job.subject,
                "body": job.body,
                "draft_status": job.draft_status,
                "status": job.status,
            }
        )

    return {"outreaches": outreaches, "total": total, "page": page, "limit": limit}


@router.patch("/{campaign_id}/outreach/{outreach_id}")

):

    repo = EmailJobRepository(db)
    job = await repo.update_draft_status(outreach_id, req.draft_status, req.subject, req.body)
    await db.commit()
    return {
        "id": job.id,
        "draft_status": job.draft_status,
        "updated_at": datetime.now(timezone.utc),
    }
