from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends, BackgroundTasks
from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession
from sqlalchemy import select
from uuid import UUID

from app.deps import get_db, get_current_user
from app.schemas.email_job import EnqueueEmailsRequest
from app.repositories.email_job_repository import EmailJobRepository
from app.repositories.campaign_repository import CampaignRepository
from app.models.user import User
from app.models.email_job import EmailJob
from app.models.contact import Contact
from app.core.exceptions import NotFoundError

router = APIRouter(prefix="/campaigns", tags=["email_jobs"])


async def _require_campaign(campaign_id: UUID, user_id, db: AsyncSession):
    repo = CampaignRepository(db)
    campaign = await repo.get_by_id_for_user(campaign_id, user_id)
    if not campaign:
        raise NotFoundError(f"Campaign {campaign_id} not found")
    return campaign


@router.post("/{campaign_id}/email-jobs", status_code=202)
async def enqueue_emails(
    campaign_id: UUID,
    req: EnqueueEmailsRequest,
    background_tasks: BackgroundTasks,
    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
    user: User = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    repo = EmailJobRepository(db)

    if req.outreach_ids == "all":
        jobs = await repo.list_approved(campaign_id)
    else:
        jobs = await repo.get_by_ids(req.outreach_ids)

    queued = 0
    skipped = 0
    for job in jobs:
        from app.repositories.contact_repository import ContactRepository

        contact_repo = ContactRepository(db)
        contact = await contact_repo.get_by_id(job.contact_id)
        if contact and contact.bounce_risk:
            skipped += 1
            continue
        await repo.update_status(job.id, "queued")
        from app.tasks.email_task import send_email_job
        from app.deps import AsyncSessionLocal

        background_tasks.add_task(send_email_job, job.id, AsyncSessionLocal)
        queued += 1

    await db.commit()
    return {
        "queued": queued,
        "skipped_bounced": skipped,
        "message": f"{queued} emails queued. Sending at 1 email/sec to stay within Gmail limits.",
    }


@router.get("/{campaign_id}/email-jobs")
async def list_email_jobs(
    campaign_id: UUID,
    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
    user: User = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    result = await db.execute(
        select(EmailJob, Contact)
        .join(Contact, EmailJob.contact_id == Contact.id)
        .where(EmailJob.campaign_id == campaign_id)
    )
    rows = result.all()
    jobs = [
        {
            "id": job.id,
            "contact_email": contact.email,
            "subject": job.subject,
            "status": job.status,
            "sent_at": job.sent_at,
        }
        for job, contact in rows
    ]
    return {"jobs": jobs, "total": len(jobs)}

from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends, BackgroundTasks
from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession
from sqlalchemy import select
from uuid import UUID

from app.deps import get_db, get_current_user
from app.schemas.email_job import EnqueueEmailsRequest
from app.repositories.email_job_repository import EmailJobRepository
from app.repositories.campaign_repository import CampaignRepository
from app.repositories.contact_repository import ContactRepository
from app.models.user import User
from app.models.email_job import EmailJob
from app.models.contact import Contact
from app.core.exceptions import NotFoundError

router = APIRouter(prefix="/campaigns", tags=["email_jobs"])


async def _require_campaign(campaign_id: UUID, user_id, db: AsyncSession):
    repo = CampaignRepository(db)
    campaign = await repo.get_by_id_for_user(campaign_id, user_id)
    if not campaign:
        raise NotFoundError(f"Campaign {campaign_id} not found")
    return campaign


@router.post("/{campaign_id}/email-jobs", status_code=202)
async def enqueue_emails(
    campaign_id: UUID,
    req: EnqueueEmailsRequest,
    background_tasks: BackgroundTasks,
    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
    user: User = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    await _require_campaign(campaign_id, user.id, db)
    job_repo = EmailJobRepository(db)

    if req.outreach_ids == "all":
        jobs = await job_repo.list_approved(campaign_id)
    else:
        jobs = await job_repo.get_by_ids(req.outreach_ids)

    if not jobs:
        await db.commit()
        return {"queued": 0, "skipped_bounced": 0, "message": "No approved emails to send."}

    # Fetch all contacts in a single query to avoid N+1
    contact_ids = [j.contact_id for j in jobs]
    contact_result = await db.execute(select(Contact).where(Contact.id.in_(contact_ids)))
    contacts_by_id = {c.id: c for c in contact_result.scalars().all()}

    queued = 0
    skipped = 0
    for job in jobs:
        contact = contacts_by_id.get(job.contact_id)
        if contact and contact.bounce_risk:
            skipped += 1
            continue
        await job_repo.update_status(job.id, "queued")
        from app.tasks.email_task import send_email_job
        from app.deps import AsyncSessionLocal

        background_tasks.add_task(send_email_job, job.id, AsyncSessionLocal)
        queued += 1

    await db.commit()
    return {
        "queued": queued,
        "skipped_bounced": skipped,
        "message": f"{queued} emails queued. Sending at 1 email/sec to stay within Gmail limits.",
    }


@router.get("/{campaign_id}/email-jobs")
async def list_email_jobs(
    campaign_id: UUID,
    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
    user: User = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    await _require_campaign(campaign_id, user.id, db)
    result = await db.execute(
        select(EmailJob, Contact)
        .join(Contact, EmailJob.contact_id == Contact.id)
        .where(EmailJob.campaign_id == campaign_id)
    )
    rows = result.all()
    jobs = [
        {
            "id": job.id,
            "contact_email": contact.email,
            "subject": job.subject,
            "status": job.status,
            "sent_at": job.sent_at,
        }
        for job, contact in rows
    ]
    return {"jobs": jobs, "total": len(jobs)}

from typing import AsyncGenerator
from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import create_async_engine, AsyncSession, async_sessionmaker
from app.config import settings
from app.core.security import decode_token
from app.repositories.user_repository import UserRepository
from fastapi import Depends, HTTPException
from fastapi.security import HTTPBearer, HTTPAuthorizationCredentials

engine = create_async_engine(settings.DATABASE_URL, echo=False)
AsyncSessionLocal = async_sessionmaker(engine, expire_on_commit=False)


async def get_db() -> AsyncGenerator[AsyncSession, None]:
    async with AsyncSessionLocal() as session:
        yield session


security = HTTPBearer()


async def get_current_user(
    credentials: HTTPAuthorizationCredentials = Depends(security),
    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
):
    try:
        payload = decode_token(credentials.credentials)
        if payload.get("token_type") != "access":
            raise ValueError("Not an access token")
        user_repo = UserRepository(db)
        user = await user_repo.get_by_id(payload["sub"])
        if not user:
            raise ValueError("User not found")
        return user
    except Exception:
        raise HTTPException(
            status_code=401,
            detail={
                "error": {"code": "UNAUTHORIZED", "message": "Invalid or expired token"}
            },
        )

from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends
from fastapi.responses import StreamingResponse
from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession
from uuid import UUID
import json

from app.deps import get_db, get_current_user
from app.schemas.chat import ChatMessageRequest
from app.services.chat_service import ChatService
from app.repositories.campaign_repository import CampaignRepository
from app.services.llm_service import LLMService
from app.api.v1.campaigns import get_llm_service
from app.models.user import User

router = APIRouter(prefix="/campaigns", tags=["chat"])


@router.post("/{campaign_id}/chat")
async def send_chat_message(
    campaign_id: UUID,
    req: ChatMessageRequest,
    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
    user: User = Depends(get_current_user),
    llm: LLMService = Depends(get_llm_service),
):
    chat_service = ChatService(CampaignRepository(db), llm)

    async def event_stream():
        extracted_params = {}
        async for chunk in chat_service.process_message(campaign_id, req.message, user.id):
            if chunk.startswith("\n\n__DONE__:"):
                try:
                    extracted_params = json.loads(chunk.replace("\n\n__DONE__:", ""))
                except Exception:
                    extracted_params = {}
                yield f"data: {json.dumps({'type': 'done', 'extracted_params': extracted_params})}\n\n"
            else:
                yield f"data: {json.dumps({'type': 'token', 'content': chunk})}\n\n"

    return StreamingResponse(event_stream(), media_type="text/event-stream")


@router.get("/{campaign_id}/chat")
async def get_chat_history(
    campaign_id: UUID,
    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
    user: User = Depends(get_current_user),
    llm: LLMService = Depends(get_llm_service),
):
    chat_service = ChatService(CampaignRepository(db), llm)
    session = await chat_service.get_session(campaign_id)
    return {
        "session_id": session.id,
        "status": session.status,
        "chat_history": session.chat_history,
        "extracted_params": session.extracted_params,
    }


@router.get("/{campaign_id}/stream")
async def campaign_stream(
    campaign_id: UUID,
    user: User = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    from app.core.sse import subscribe, unsubscribe

    async def event_generator():
        q = subscribe(str(campaign_id))
        try:
            while True:
                event = await q.get()
                yield f"data: {json.dumps(event)}\n\n"
                if event.get("type") == "complete":
                    break
        finally:
            unsubscribe(str(campaign_id), q)

    return StreamingResponse(event_generator(), media_type="text/event-stream")

from uuid import UUID
from typing import AsyncGenerator
from app.repositories.campaign_repository import CampaignRepository
from app.services.llm_service import LLMService
from app.core.exceptions import NotFoundError
from app.models.campaign_session import CampaignSession

CHAT_SYSTEM_PROMPT = """You are an AI assistant helping users create personalized email outreach campaigns.
Your goal is to understand:
1. Who they want to reach (target companies, titles, geography)
2. What they want to say (purpose, value proposition)
3. Their preferred tools (email source: apollo/scrape, AI provider: openai/anthropic/gemini)

Ask clarifying questions naturally. Once you have enough information, confirm the details."""


class ChatService:
    def __init__(self, campaign_repo: CampaignRepository, llm_service: LLMService):
        self.campaign_repo = campaign_repo
        self.llm_service = llm_service

    async def process_message(
        self, campaign_id: UUID, message: str, user_id: UUID
    ) -> AsyncGenerator[dict, None]:
        session = await self.campaign_repo.get_session(campaign_id)
        if not session:
            raise NotFoundError(f"Session for campaign {campaign_id} not found")

        history = list(session.chat_history or [])
        history.append({"role": "user", "content": message})

        response = await self.llm_service.chat_completion(history, CHAT_SYSTEM_PROMPT)

        history.append({"role": "assistant", "content": response})
        session.chat_history = history
        await self.campaign_repo.update(session)

        # Stream response token by token as structured events
        words = response.split()
        for i, word in enumerate(words):
            yield {"type": "token", "content": word + (" " if i < len(words) - 1 else "")}

        # Attempt param extraction and emit done event
        extracted_params: dict = {}
        try:
            campaign = await self.campaign_repo.get_by_id(campaign_id)
            extracted_params = await self.llm_service.extract_params(
                history, campaign.type if campaign else "b2b"
            )
        except Exception:
            pass

        yield {"type": "done", "extracted_params": extracted_params}

    async def get_session(self, campaign_id: UUID) -> CampaignSession:
        session = await self.campaign_repo.get_session(campaign_id)
        if not session:
            raise NotFoundError(f"Session for campaign {campaign_id} not found")
        return session

    async def finalize_session(
        self, campaign_id: UUID, extracted_params: dict
    ) -> CampaignSession:
        session = await self.campaign_repo.get_session(campaign_id)
        if not session:
            raise NotFoundError(f"Session for campaign {campaign_id} not found")
        session.extracted_params = extracted_params
        session.status = "completed"
        return await self.campaign_repo.update(session)

        # Stream response word by word
        words = response.split()
        for i, word in enumerate(words):
            yield word + (" " if i < len(words) - 1 else "")

        # After streaming, attempt param extraction
        try:
            campaign = await self.campaign_repo.get_by_id(campaign_id)
            await self.llm_service.extract_params(
                history, campaign.type if campaign else "b2b"
            )
            yield "\n\n__DONE__:{}"
        except Exception:
            yield "\n\n__DONE__:{}"

    async def get_session(self, campaign_id: UUID) -> CampaignSession:
        session = await self.campaign_repo.get_session(campaign_id)
        if not session:
            raise NotFoundError(f"Session for campaign {campaign_id} not found")
        return session

    async def finalize_session(
        self, campaign_id: UUID, extracted_params: dict
    ) -> CampaignSession:
        session = await self.campaign_repo.get_session(campaign_id)
        if not session:
            raise NotFoundError(f"Session for campaign {campaign_id} not found")
        session.extracted_params = extracted_params
        session.status = "completed"
        return await self.campaign_repo.update(session)

content.text:
**19/19 passing.** All fixes applied and tests green. Here's the full summary of what was done:

---

**Backend status: complete and reviewed.**

**TDD vertical slices completed:**
- campaigns (5 tests), auth (2), chat (2), outreach (4), email_jobs (3), llm_service (3) — **19/19 passing**

**Devil's advocate review findings and fixes:**

| Severity | Issue | Fix |
|---|---|---|
| CRITICAL | CORS `allow_origins=["*"]` | Env-aware: `*` in dev, `CORS_ORIGINS` list in prod |
| HIGH | N+1 queries in outreach listing | Replaced per-row contact fetch with `JOIN` query |
| HIGH | N+1 queries in email enqueue | Batch contact fetch with `IN` clause |
| HIGH | Fragile SSE `__DONE__:` string parsing | `chat_service` now yields structured `dict` events |
| HIGH | No campaign ownership check on outreach/email routes | Added `_require_campaign()` guard to both routers |
| HIGH | `auth.py` route duplicated `AuthService` logic | Route now delegates to `AuthService` |
| MEDIUM | Broad `except Exception` in `deps.py` auth | Catch only JWT errors; let DB errors propagate as 500 |
| MEDIUM | Manual URL string concat in `google_oauth.py` | Replaced with `urllib.parse.urlencode` |
| MEDIUM | Default `SECRET_KEY` too short (25 bytes) | Extended to 42 chars, added `CORS_ORIGINS` config field |
| MEDIUM | Auth callback never returned `refresh_token` | Now returns both `access_token` and `refresh_token` |

**Known v1 limitations (documented, not fixed):** In-process SSE (no Redis pub/sub), `BackgroundTasks` (no persistent job queue), sequential LLM generation per contact.

2. Key Technical Concepts:
   - FastAPI + SQLAlchemy 2.0 async + aiosqlite (for tests) + asyncpg (for production)
   - TDD vertical slices: one test → one implementation → repeat
   - Repository pattern (`AsyncBaseRepository[T]`)
   - Strategy pattern for LLM providers (`AbstractLLMProvider` → `OpenAIProvider`, `AnthropicProvider`)

   - Cross-database compatible SQLAlchemy types: `Uuid` and `JSON().with_variant(JSONB(), "postgresql")`

3. Files and Code Sections:

   - **`app/models/__init__.py`** — Added explicit imports of all models so `Base.metadata.create_all` populates the full schema for test SQLite database creation.
     ```python
     from sqlalchemy.orm import DeclarativeBase
     class Base(DeclarativeBase):
         pass
     from app.models.user import User  # noqa
     from app.models.campaign import Campaign  # noqa
     from app.models.campaign_session import CampaignSession  # noqa
     from app.models.contact import Contact  # noqa
     from app.models.email_job import EmailJob  # noqa
     ```

   - **`app/models/user.py`** — Fixed PostgreSQL-specific types to cross-database compatible:
     ```python
     from sqlalchemy import Text, DateTime, JSON, Uuid
     from sqlalchemy.dialects.postgresql import JSONB
     _JSON = JSON().with_variant(JSONB(), "postgresql")
     # id: Mapped[uuid.UUID] = mapped_column(Uuid(as_uuid=True), primary_key=True, default=uuid.uuid4)
     # gmail_oauth_token: Mapped[dict | None] = mapped_column(_JSON)
     # google_profile: Mapped[dict] = mapped_column(_JSON, default=dict)
     ```

   - **`app/models/campaign.py`**, **`campaign_session.py`** — Same JSONB/UUID fix pattern applied.

   - **`app/models/contact.py`**, **`app/models/email_job.py`** — Replaced `UUID(as_uuid=True)` from `postgresql` dialect with `Uuid(as_uuid=True)` from `sqlalchemy` core.

   - **`tests/conftest.py`** — Added `MockLLMProvider` and overrides `get_llm_service` dependency:
     ```python
     from app.api.v1.campaigns import get_llm_service

     class MockLLMProvider(AbstractLLMProvider):
         async def chat_completion(self, messages, system_prompt, model) -> str:
             return "Mock response: tell me more about your goals."
         async def structured_completion(self, messages, system_prompt, model) -> dict:
             return {"subject": "Mock Subject", "body": "Mock email body."}

     def mock_llm_service() -> LLMService:
         return LLMService(provider=MockLLMProvider())

     # In client fixture:
     app.dependency_overrides[get_llm_service] = mock_llm_service
     ```

   - **`app/api/v1/chat.py`** — Switched from inline `OpenAIProvider()` creation to injected dependency, and simplified SSE event loop to consume structured dicts:
     ```python
     from app.api.v1.campaigns import get_llm_service
     # ...
     async def event_stream():
         async for event in chat_service.process_message(campaign_id, req.message, user.id):
             yield f"data: {json.dumps(event)}\n\n"
     ```

   - **`app/services/chat_service.py`** — Replaced fragile `__DONE__:` string sentinel with structured dict events:
     ```python
     async def process_message(self, campaign_id, message, user_id) -> AsyncGenerator[dict, None]:
         # ... LLM call, history update ...
         for i, word in enumerate(words):
             yield {"type": "token", "content": word + (" " if i < len(words) - 1 else "")}
         extracted_params: dict = {}
         try:
             campaign = await self.campaign_repo.get_by_id(campaign_id)
             extracted_params = await self.llm_service.extract_params(history, campaign.type if campaign else "b2b")
         except Exception:
             pass
         yield {"type": "done", "extracted_params": extracted_params}
     ```

   - **`app/api/v1/auth.py`** — Refactored to delegate to `AuthService` (SRP fix), added `refresh_token` to response:
     ```python
     def get_auth_service(db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db)) -> AuthService:
         return AuthService(UserRepository(db))

     @router.get("/google/callback")
     async def google_callback(code, state="", db=Depends(get_db), auth_service=Depends(get_auth_service)):
         tokens = await exchange_code(code)
         user_info = await get_user_info(tokens["access_token"])
         user, _created = await auth_service.get_or_create_google_user(user_info, tokens)
         await db.commit()
         return {
             "access_token": create_access_token(user.id, user.email),
             "refresh_token": create_refresh_token(user.id),
             "token_type": "bearer",
             "user": {"id": str(user.id), "email": user.email},
         }
     ```

   - **`app/core/google_oauth.py`** — Fixed URL encoding:
     ```python
     def get_auth_url(state: str = "") -> str:
         from urllib.parse import urlencode
         params = { "client_id": ..., "redirect_uri": ..., ... }
         return f"{GOOGLE_AUTH_URL}?{urlencode(params)}"
     ```

   - **`app/main.py`** — Environment-aware CORS:
     ```python
     _cors_origins = ["*"] if _settings.APP_ENV == "development" else _settings.CORS_ORIGINS
     app.add_middleware(CORSMiddleware, allow_origins=_cors_origins, ...)
     ```

   - **`app/config.py`** — Lengthened default secret, added CORS_ORIGINS:
     ```python
     SECRET_KEY: str = "dev-secret-change-in-prod-minimum-32-chars!"
     CORS_ORIGINS: list[str] = ["http://localhost:3000", "http://localhost:3001"]
     ```

   - **`app/api/v1/outreach.py`** — Added campaign ownership guard, replaced N+1 with JOIN:
     ```python
     async def _require_campaign(campaign_id, user_id, db):
         repo = CampaignRepository(db)
         campaign = await repo.get_by_id_for_user(campaign_id, user_id)
         if not campaign:
             raise NotFoundError(f"Campaign {campaign_id} not found")
         return campaign

     # In list_outreach: single JOIN query instead of per-row contact fetch
     result = await db.execute(
         select(EmailJob, Contact)
         .join(Contact, EmailJob.contact_id == Contact.id)
         .where(EmailJob.campaign_id == campaign_id)
     )
     ```

   - **`app/api/v1/email_jobs.py`** — Added ownership check, batch contact fetch:
     ```python
     # Batch fetch all contacts to avoid N+1
     contact_ids = [j.contact_id for j in jobs]
     contact_result = await db.execute(select(Contact).where(Contact.id.in_(contact_ids)))
     contacts_by_id = {c.id: c for c in contact_result.scalars().all()}
     ```

   - **`app/deps.py`** — Narrowed exception handling to catch only JWT errors:
     ```python
     import jwt as _jwt
     try:
         payload = decode_token(credentials.credentials)
     except (_jwt.ExpiredSignatureError, _jwt.InvalidTokenError):
         raise HTTPException(status_code=401, ...)
     # DB errors and bugs now propagate as 500, not masked as 401
     ```

   - **`tests/test_outreach.py`** — New file with 4 tests for outreach CRUD
   - **`tests/test_email_jobs.py`** — New file with 3 tests for email enqueue/list

4. Errors and fixes:
   - **`AttributeError: 'SQLiteTypeCompiler' has no attribute 'visit_JSONB'`**: SQLite doesn't support PostgreSQL's `JSONB` or `UUID` dialect types. Fixed by replacing `JSONB` with `JSON().with_variant(JSONB(), "postgresql")` and `UUID(as_uuid=True)` (from postgresql dialect) with `Uuid(as_uuid=True)` (from sqlalchemy core) in all 5 model files. Also added all model imports to `models/__init__.py` so `create_all` sees them.

   - **`openai.OpenAIError: Missing credentials`**: `OpenAIProvider.__init__` immediately instantiates `AsyncOpenAI` which raises if no `OPENAI_API_KEY` is set. Fixed by adding `MockLLMProvider` to conftest and overriding the `get_llm_service` FastAPI dependency in test client fixture.

   - **`chat.py` hard-coding `OpenAIProvider()`**: The GET and POST chat routes created `LLMService(provider=OpenAIProvider())` inline, bypassing the dependency injection override. Fixed by importing and using `get_llm_service` from `campaigns.py` as a `Depends()`.

5. Problem Solving:
   - Cross-database model compatibility: The models were written for PostgreSQL production but tests use SQLite. Solution: SQLAlchemy's `Uuid` type and `JSON().with_variant(JSONB(), "postgresql")` provide transparent DB-specific type mapping.
   - Test isolation for LLM: Used FastAPI's `dependency_overrides` mechanism to inject a `MockLLMProvider` that doesn't require API credentials, keeping tests fast and deterministic.
   - N+1 query pattern: Two routes were making O(n) database calls per result row. Fixed with JOIN queries and batch `IN` fetches.
   - Fragile SSE sentinel: The `__DONE__:` string parsing was LLM-output-dependent and could break on whitespace. Fixed by making `chat_service.process_message` yield typed dicts (`{"type": "token", ...}` / `{"type": "done", ...}`).

Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.

- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.

Also use when the user wants a one-time scheduled run ("run this once at 3pm", "remind me to check X tomorrow").

<!-- BEGIN:nextjs-agent-rules -->
# This is NOT the Next.js you know

from uuid import UUID
from typing import AsyncGenerator
from app.repositories.campaign_repository import CampaignRepository
from app.services.llm_service import LLMService
from app.core.exceptions import NotFoundError
from app.models.campaign_session import CampaignSession

CHAT_SYSTEM_PROMPT = """You are an AI assistant helping users create personalized email outreach campaigns.
Your goal is to understand:
1. Who they want to reach (target companies, titles, geography)
2. What they want to say (purpose, value proposition)
3. Their preferred tools (email source: apollo/scrape, AI provider: openai/anthropic/gemini)

Ask clarifying questions naturally. Once you have enough information, confirm the details."""


class ChatService:
    def __init__(self, campaign_repo: CampaignRepository, llm_service: LLMService):
        self.campaign_repo = campaign_repo
        self.llm_service = llm_service

    async def process_message(
        self, campaign_id: UUID, message: str, user_id: UUID
    ) -> AsyncGenerator[dict, None]:
        session = await self.campaign_repo.get_session(campaign_id)
        if not session:
            raise NotFoundError(f"Session for campaign {campaign_id} not found")

        history = list(session.chat_history or [])
        history.append({"role": "user", "content": message})

        response = await self.llm_service.chat_completion(history, CHAT_SYSTEM_PROMPT)

        history.append({"role": "assistant", "content": response})
        session.chat_history = history
        await self.campaign_repo.update(session)

        # Stream response token by token as structured events
        words = response.split()
        for i, word in enumerate(words):
            yield {"type": "token", "content": word + (" " if i < len(words) - 1 else "")}

        # Attempt param extraction and emit done event
        extracted_params: dict = {}
        try:
            campaign = await self.campaign_repo.get_by_id(campaign_id)
            extracted_params = await self.llm_service.extract_params(
                history, campaign.type if campaign else "b2b"
            )
        except Exception:
            pass

        yield {"type": "done", "extracted_params": extracted_params}

    async def get_session(self, campaign_id: UUID) -> CampaignSession:
        session = await self.campaign_repo.get_session(campaign_id)
        if not session:
            raise NotFoundError(f"Session for campaign {campaign_id} not found")
        return session

    async def finalize_session(
        self, campaign_id: UUID, extracted_params: dict
    ) -> CampaignSession:
        session = await self.campaign_repo.get_session(campaign_id)
        if not session:
            raise NotFoundError(f"Session for campaign {campaign_id} not found")
        session.extracted_params = extracted_params
        session.status = "completed"
        return await self.campaign_repo.update(session)

from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends
from fastapi.responses import StreamingResponse
from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession
from uuid import UUID
import json

from app.deps import get_db, get_current_user
from app.schemas.chat import ChatMessageRequest
from app.services.chat_service import ChatService
from app.repositories.campaign_repository import CampaignRepository
from app.services.llm_service import LLMService
from app.api.v1.campaigns import get_llm_service
from app.models.user import User

router = APIRouter(prefix="/campaigns", tags=["chat"])


@router.post("/{campaign_id}/chat")
async def send_chat_message(
    campaign_id: UUID,
    req: ChatMessageRequest,
    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
    user: User = Depends(get_current_user),
    llm: LLMService = Depends(get_llm_service),
):
    chat_service = ChatService(CampaignRepository(db), llm)

    async def event_stream():
        async for event in chat_service.process_message(campaign_id, req.message, user.id):
            yield f"data: {json.dumps(event)}\n\n"

    return StreamingResponse(event_stream(), media_type="text/event-stream")


@router.get("/{campaign_id}/chat")
async def get_chat_history(
    campaign_id: UUID,
    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
    user: User = Depends(get_current_user),
    llm: LLMService = Depends(get_llm_service),
):
    chat_service = ChatService(CampaignRepository(db), llm)
    session = await chat_service.get_session(campaign_id)
    return {
        "session_id": session.id,
        "status": session.status,
        "chat_history": session.chat_history,
        "extracted_params": session.extracted_params,
    }


@router.get("/{campaign_id}/stream")
async def campaign_stream(
    campaign_id: UUID,
    user: User = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    from app.core.sse import subscribe, unsubscribe

    async def event_generator():
        q = subscribe(str(campaign_id))
        try:
            while True:
                event = await q.get()
                yield f"data: {json.dumps(event)}\n\n"
                if event.get("type") == "complete":
                    break
        finally:
            unsubscribe(str(campaign_id), q)

    return StreamingResponse(event_generator(), media_type="text/event-stream")

from typing import AsyncGenerator
from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import create_async_engine, AsyncSession, async_sessionmaker
from app.config import settings
from app.core.security import decode_token
from app.repositories.user_repository import UserRepository
from fastapi import Depends, HTTPException
from fastapi.security import HTTPBearer, HTTPAuthorizationCredentials

engine = create_async_engine(settings.DATABASE_URL, echo=False)
AsyncSessionLocal = async_sessionmaker(engine, expire_on_commit=False)


async def get_db() -> AsyncGenerator[AsyncSession, None]:
    async with AsyncSessionLocal() as session:
        yield session


security = HTTPBearer()


async def get_current_user(
    credentials: HTTPAuthorizationCredentials = Depends(security),
    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
):
    import jwt as _jwt

    try:
        payload = decode_token(credentials.credentials)
    except (_jwt.ExpiredSignatureError, _jwt.InvalidTokenError):
        raise HTTPException(
            status_code=401,
            detail={"error": {"code": "UNAUTHORIZED", "message": "Invalid or expired token"}},
        )

    if payload.get("token_type") != "access":
        raise HTTPException(
            status_code=401,
            detail={"error": {"code": "UNAUTHORIZED", "message": "Invalid token type"}},
        )

    user_repo = UserRepository(db)
    user = await user_repo.get_by_id(payload["sub"])
    if not user:
        raise HTTPException(
            status_code=401,
            detail={"error": {"code": "UNAUTHORIZED", "message": "User not found"}},
        )
    return user

from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends, BackgroundTasks
from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession
from sqlalchemy import select
from uuid import UUID

from app.deps import get_db, get_current_user
from app.schemas.email_job import EnqueueEmailsRequest
from app.repositories.email_job_repository import EmailJobRepository
from app.repositories.campaign_repository import CampaignRepository
from app.repositories.contact_repository import ContactRepository
from app.models.user import User
from app.models.email_job import EmailJob
from app.models.contact import Contact
from app.core.exceptions import NotFoundError

router = APIRouter(prefix="/campaigns", tags=["email_jobs"])


async def _require_campaign(campaign_id: UUID, user_id, db: AsyncSession):
    repo = CampaignRepository(db)
    campaign = await repo.get_by_id_for_user(campaign_id, user_id)
    if not campaign:
        raise NotFoundError(f"Campaign {campaign_id} not found")
    return campaign


@router.post("/{campaign_id}/email-jobs", status_code=202)
async def enqueue_emails(
    campaign_id: UUID,
    req: EnqueueEmailsRequest,
    background_tasks: BackgroundTasks,
    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
    user: User = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    await _require_campaign(campaign_id, user.id, db)
    job_repo = EmailJobRepository(db)

    if req.outreach_ids == "all":
        jobs = await job_repo.list_approved(campaign_id)
    else:
        jobs = await job_repo.get_by_ids(req.outreach_ids)

    if not jobs:
        await db.commit()
        return {"queued": 0, "skipped_bounced": 0, "message": "No approved emails to send."}

    # Fetch all contacts in a single query to avoid N+1
    contact_ids = [j.contact_id for j in jobs]
    contact_result = await db.execute(select(Contact).where(Contact.id.in_(contact_ids)))
    contacts_by_id = {c.id: c for c in contact_result.scalars().all()}

    queued = 0
    skipped = 0
    for job in jobs:
        contact = contacts_by_id.get(job.contact_id)
        if contact and contact.bounce_risk:
            skipped += 1
            continue
        await job_repo.update_status(job.id, "queued")
        from app.tasks.email_task import send_email_job
        from app.deps import AsyncSessionLocal

        background_tasks.add_task(send_email_job, job.id, AsyncSessionLocal)
        queued += 1

    await db.commit()
    return {
        "queued": queued,
        "skipped_bounced": skipped,
        "message": f"{queued} emails queued. Sending at 1 email/sec to stay within Gmail limits.",
    }


@router.get("/{campaign_id}/email-jobs")
async def list_email_jobs(
    campaign_id: UUID,
    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
    user: User = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    await _require_campaign(campaign_id, user.id, db)
    result = await db.execute(
        select(EmailJob, Contact)
        .join(Contact, EmailJob.contact_id == Contact.id)
        .where(EmailJob.campaign_id == campaign_id)
    )
    rows = result.all()
    jobs = [
        {
            "id": job.id,
            "contact_email": contact.email,
            "subject": job.subject,
            "status": job.status,
            "sent_at": job.sent_at,
        }
        for job, contact in rows
    ]
    return {"jobs": jobs, "total": len(jobs)}

$(find src -type f -name '*.tsx' -o -name '*.ts' | grep -v 'node_modules' | sort | while read f; do echo "=== $f ==="; cat "$f"; echo; done)

The client must:
1. Export a base fetch helper that reads token from localStorage key 'outreach_token' and adds Authorization: Bearer header
2. Export typed functions for ALL these endpoints:
   - auth: googleAuthUrl() -> GET /api/v1/auth/google -> {url: string}
   - campaigns: listCampaigns() -> GET /api/v1/campaigns -> CampaignListResponse
   - campaigns: createCampaign(type) -> POST /api/v1/campaigns -> CampaignCreateResponse
   - campaigns: getCampaign(id) -> GET /api/v1/campaigns/{id} -> Campaign
   - chat: getChatHistory(campaignId) -> GET /api/v1/campaigns/{id}/chat -> ChatHistoryResponse
   - chat: sendMessage(campaignId, message) -> POST /api/v1/campaigns/{id}/chat (streaming SSE) -> EventSource-style
   - outreach: listOutreach(campaignId, page?, limit?) -> GET /api/v1/campaigns/{id}/outreach -> OutreachListResponse
   - outreach: updateOutreach(campaignId, outreachId, status) -> PATCH /api/v1/campaigns/{id}/outreach/{outreach_id}
   - emailJobs: listEmailJobs(campaignId) -> GET /api/v1/campaigns/{id}/email-jobs -> EmailJobsResponse
   - emailJobs: enqueueEmails(campaignId, outreach_ids) -> POST /api/v1/campaigns/{id}/email-jobs
   - stats: getCampaignStats(campaignId) -> GET /api/v1/campaigns/{id}/stats -> CampaignStats

3. For the streaming SSE sendMessage, return an EventSource-compatible stream by opening a fetch with ReadableStream and yielding parsed events as {type: 'token'|'done', content?: string, extracted_params?: Record<string,unknown>}

Import types from '@/types/index' (already has all needed types).

Write clean TypeScript with no comments. Export all functions as named exports." 2>&1 | tail -60

content.text: While those run, I'll write the docker-compose with backend service, the env files, and the API client directly.

input.content:
version: "3.9"
services:
  db:
    image: postgres:16
    environment:
      POSTGRES_USER: outreach
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: outreach
      POSTGRES_DB: outreach_db
    ports:
      - "5432:5432"
    volumes:
      - pgdata:/var/lib/postgresql/data
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U outreach -d outreach_db"]
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 10

  backend:
    build:
      context: .
      dockerfile: Dockerfile
    ports:
      - "8000:8000"
    environment:
      - APP_ENV=development
      - DATABASE_URL=postgresql+asyncpg://outreach:outreach@db:5432/outreach_db
      - SECRET_KEY=dev-secret-change-in-prod-minimum-32-chars!
      - CORS_ORIGINS=["http://localhost:3000","http://localhost:3001"]
    env_file:
      - .env
    depends_on:
      db:
        condition: service_healthy
    command: >
      sh -c "alembic upgrade head && uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --reload"
    volumes:
      - .:/app

volumes:
  pgdata:

from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends
from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession

from app.core.google_oauth import get_auth_url, exchange_code, get_user_info
from app.core.security import create_access_token, create_refresh_token
from app.repositories.user_repository import UserRepository
from app.services.auth_service import AuthService
from app.deps import get_db

router = APIRouter(prefix="/auth", tags=["auth"])


def get_auth_service(db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db)) -> AuthService:
    return AuthService(UserRepository(db))


@router.post("/google")
async def google_auth_init():
    auth_url = get_auth_url()
    return {"auth_url": auth_url}


@router.get("/google/callback")
async def google_callback(
    code: str,
    state: str = "",
    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
    auth_service: AuthService = Depends(get_auth_service),
):
    tokens = await exchange_code(code)
    user_info = await get_user_info(tokens["access_token"])

    user, _created = await auth_service.get_or_create_google_user(user_info, tokens)
    await db.commit()

    access_token = create_access_token(user.id, user.email)
    refresh_token = create_refresh_token(user.id)
    return {
        "access_token": access_token,
        "refresh_token": refresh_token,
        "token_type": "bearer",
        "user": {"id": str(user.id), "email": user.email},
    }

import asyncio
from logging.config import fileConfig
from sqlalchemy import pool
from sqlalchemy.engine import Connection
from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import async_engine_from_config
from alembic import context

# Import all models so metadata is populated
from app.models import Base  # noqa: F401
from app.models.user import User  # noqa: F401
from app.models.campaign import Campaign  # noqa: F401
from app.models.campaign_session import CampaignSession  # noqa: F401
from app.models.contact import Contact  # noqa: F401
from app.models.email_job import EmailJob  # noqa: F401

config = context.config

if config.config_file_name is not None:
    fileConfig(config.config_file_name)

target_metadata = Base.metadata


def run_migrations_offline() -> None:
    url = config.get_main_option("sqlalchemy.url")
    context.configure(
        url=url,
        target_metadata=target_metadata,
        literal_binds=True,
        dialect_opts={"paramstyle": "named"},
    )
    with context.begin_transaction():
        context.run_migrations()


def do_run_migrations(connection: Connection) -> None:
    context.configure(connection=connection, target_metadata=target_metadata)
    with context.begin_transaction():
        context.run_migrations()


async def run_async_migrations() -> None:
    connectable = async_engine_from_config(
        config.get_section(config.config_ini_section, {}),
        prefix="sqlalchemy.",
        poolclass=pool.NullPool,
    )
    async with connectable.connect() as connection:
        await connection.run_sync(do_run_migrations)
    await connectable.dispose()


def run_migrations_online() -> None:
    asyncio.run(run_async_migrations())


if context.is_offline_mode():
    run_migrations_offline()
else:
    run_migrations_online()

"""initial_schema

Revision ID: ffd07cb54751
Revises:
Create Date: 2026-05-09
"""
from alembic import op
import sqlalchemy as sa
from sqlalchemy.dialects import postgresql

revision = "ffd07cb54751"
down_revision = None
branch_labels = None
depends_on = None


def upgrade() -> None:
    op.create_table(
        "users",
        sa.Column("id", sa.Uuid(as_uuid=True), primary_key=True),
        sa.Column("email", sa.String(), nullable=False, unique=True),
        sa.Column("name", sa.String(), nullable=True),
        sa.Column("google_id", sa.String(), nullable=True, unique=True),
        sa.Column(
            "gmail_oauth_token",
            sa.JSON().with_variant(postgresql.JSONB(), "postgresql"),
            nullable=True,
        ),
        sa.Column(
            "google_profile",
            sa.JSON().with_variant(postgresql.JSONB(), "postgresql"),
            nullable=False,
            server_default="{}",
        ),
        sa.Column("created_at", sa.DateTime(timezone=True), nullable=False,
                  server_default=sa.text("now()")),
        sa.Column("updated_at", sa.DateTime(timezone=True), nullable=False,
                  server_default=sa.text("now()")),
    )

    op.create_table(
        "campaigns",
        sa.Column("id", sa.Uuid(as_uuid=True), primary_key=True),
        sa.Column("user_id", sa.Uuid(as_uuid=True),
                  sa.ForeignKey("users.id", ondelete="CASCADE"), nullable=False),
        sa.Column("type", sa.String(), nullable=False),
        sa.Column("status", sa.String(), nullable=False, server_default="draft"),
        sa.Column(
            "config_json",
            sa.JSON().with_variant(postgresql.JSONB(), "postgresql"),
            nullable=True,
        ),
        sa.Column("created_at", sa.DateTime(timezone=True), nullable=False,
                  server_default=sa.text("now()")),
        sa.Column("updated_at", sa.DateTime(timezone=True), nullable=False,
                  server_default=sa.text("now()")),
    )
    op.create_index("ix_campaigns_user_id", "campaigns", ["user_id"])

    op.create_table(
        "campaign_sessions",
        sa.Column("id", sa.Uuid(as_uuid=True), primary_key=True),
        sa.Column("campaign_id", sa.Uuid(as_uuid=True),
                  sa.ForeignKey("campaigns.id", ondelete="CASCADE"), nullable=False),
        sa.Column("status", sa.String(), nullable=False, server_default="active"),
        sa.Column(
            "chat_history",
            sa.JSON().with_variant(postgresql.JSONB(), "postgresql"),
            nullable=True,
        ),
        sa.Column(
            "extracted_params",
            sa.JSON().with_variant(postgresql.JSONB(), "postgresql"),
            nullable=True,
        ),
        sa.Column("created_at", sa.DateTime(timezone=True), nullable=False,
                  server_default=sa.text("now()")),
        sa.Column("updated_at", sa.DateTime(timezone=True), nullable=False,
                  server_default=sa.text("now()")),
    )
    op.create_index("ix_campaign_sessions_campaign_id", "campaign_sessions", ["campaign_id"])

    op.create_table(
        "contacts",
        sa.Column("id", sa.Uuid(as_uuid=True), primary_key=True),
        sa.Column("campaign_id", sa.Uuid(as_uuid=True),
                  sa.ForeignKey("campaigns.id", ondelete="CASCADE"), nullable=False),
        sa.Column("company", sa.String(), nullable=True),
        sa.Column("person_name", sa.String(), nullable=True),
        sa.Column("email", sa.String(), nullable=False),
        sa.Column("title", sa.String(), nullable=True),
        sa.Column("source", sa.String(), nullable=True),
        sa.Column("bounce_risk", sa.Boolean(), nullable=False, server_default="false"),
        sa.Column("created_at", sa.DateTime(timezone=True), nullable=False,
                  server_default=sa.text("now()")),
    )
    op.create_index("ix_contacts_campaign_id", "contacts", ["campaign_id"])

    op.create_table(
        "email_jobs",
        sa.Column("id", sa.Uuid(as_uuid=True), primary_key=True),
        sa.Column("campaign_id", sa.Uuid(as_uuid=True),
                  sa.ForeignKey("campaigns.id", ondelete="CASCADE"), nullable=False),
        sa.Column("contact_id", sa.Uuid(as_uuid=True),
                  sa.ForeignKey("contacts.id", ondelete="CASCADE"), nullable=False),
        sa.Column("subject", sa.String(), nullable=True),
        sa.Column("body", sa.Text(), nullable=True),
        sa.Column("draft_status", sa.String(), nullable=False, server_default="pending"),
        sa.Column("status", sa.String(), nullable=False, server_default="draft"),
        sa.Column("sent_at", sa.DateTime(timezone=True), nullable=True),
        sa.Column("created_at", sa.DateTime(timezone=True), nullable=False,
                  server_default=sa.text("now()")),
        sa.Column("updated_at", sa.DateTime(timezone=True), nullable=False,
                  server_default=sa.text("now()")),
    )
    op.create_index("ix_email_jobs_campaign_id", "email_jobs", ["campaign_id"])
    op.create_index("ix_email_jobs_contact_id", "email_jobs", ["contact_id"])


def downgrade() -> None:
    op.drop_table("email_jobs")
    op.drop_table("contacts")
    op.drop_table("campaign_sessions")
    op.drop_table("campaigns")
    op.drop_table("users")
